d: Btw don’t ask why I’m playing I was just playing random stuff  Roblox is an immense online gaming platform and game creation system that allows users to play millions of 3D experiences created by a global community of developers. Launched in 2006, it has evolved into a social "co-experience" hub where users can build, chat, and customize avatars.  Key Features Endless Experiences: Millions of user-made games across genres like roleplay (Brookhaven RP), simulation (Adopt Me!), and obstacle courses. Roblox Studio: A free Roblox Creator Hub tool that lets anyone build their own 3D worlds using the Luau programming language. Avatar Customization: A massive Marketplace where players use Robux (virtual currency) to buy clothing, accessories, and animations. Cross-Platform Play: Available on iOS, Android, Xbox, PlayStation, PC, and VR headsets.  Safety & Costs Safety Controls: Features include Parental Controls, age-verification, and automated content moderation to protect younger players. Monetization: While free to play, Roblox Premium subscriptions and Robux packs (starting around $4.99) allow for exclusive items and in-game advantages.  #roblox #robloxedit #robloxstory #robloxgames #robloxx
zh: 顺便说一下，别问我为什么在玩，我只是随便试试。Roblox是一个庞大的在线游戏平台和游戏创作系统，用户可以畅玩由全球开发者社区创建的数百万个3D体验。该平台于2006年上线，已发展成为一个社交共创中心，用户可在其中建造、聊天和自定义角色形象。主要功能包括：海量体验（涵盖角色扮演、模拟经营、障碍跑酷等类型）、Roblox Studio（免费创作工具，支持Luau语言搭建3D世界）、角色定制（使用Robux虚拟货币购买服装和道具）、跨平台游玩（支持iOS、Android、Xbox、PlayStation、PC及VR设备）。安全与费用方面：平台设有家长控制、年龄验证和内容审核机制；游戏本身免费，但Roblox Premium订阅和Robux礼包（起价约4.99美元）可解锁专属道具和游戏优势。

d: this idea is so unique!! CHEW YOUR FOOD is a short survival horror game set inside a monster's stomach. You were eaten mostly whole and now you have to crawl your way out. No legs. Constant bleeding. Bandages that need to be re-secured at exactly the right moment. Something else is in here with you and you can only trust your ears to avoid it. Hand-drawn art, frame-by-frame animations, and beatable in under an hour. 🎮 Game: CHEW YOUR FOOD 🎯 Genre: Survival Horror / Puzzle 👥 Players: Single-player 💻 Platform: PC (Steam) 🛠️ Developer: Coco Dayo 📅 Release Date: Q3 2026 #indiegame #newgame #horrorgames #gameplay
zh: 这个创意太独特了！《咀嚼你的食物》是一款短篇生存恐怖游戏，背景设定在怪物的胃里。你几乎被整个吞下，现在必须爬着出去。没有双腿，持续流血，绷带需要在精确时机重新固定。这里还有别的东西，你只能靠耳朵来躲避它。手绘美术，逐帧动画，一小时内可通关。游戏：咀嚼你的食物 类型：生存恐怖/解谜 玩家：单人 平台：PC（Steam） 开发者：Coco Dayo 发行日期：2026年第三季度

d: Di Filipina, viral sebuah tempat yang konsepnya mirip warnet, tapi khusus buat main Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. Pengunjung cukup bayar pakai koin untuk dapat waktu bermain. Menariknya, karena semuanya online, bukan nggak mungkin bisa ketemu dan mabar langsung sama orang-orang di tempat itu juga. Konsepnya unik sih, apalagi buat yang nggak punya device memadai atau sekadar cari tempat mabar rame-rame. Kalau menurut kalian, konsep kayak gini bakal cocok juga nggak kalau ada di Indonesia? #MobileLegends #MLBB #Warnet #Gaming #Filipina

d: هذا النوع من المقاطع يعتمد على أجواء التسعينات والتسجيلات القديمة مثل أشرطة VHS والتلفزيونات القديمة، ويستخدم التشويش وضعف الجودة والأصوات الهادئة عشان يعطي شعور غريب وغير مريح. الرعب هنا مو مباشر، ما يعتمد على إخافتك فجأة، بل يخليك تحس بتوتر وغموض كأن فيه شيء غلط بالمشهد أو كأنك تشاهد تسجيل قديم وممنوع. أكثر شيء يميز هذي المقاطع إنها تعطي إحساس مألوف لكن بنفس الوقت مقلق، وكأن الذكرى نفسها صارت مخيفة.                                          #lostmedia #analoghorror #vhs
zh: 这类视频以九十年代的氛围和旧式录像为基调，借助VHS磁带画质、老式电视机、画面噪点、低分辨率和低沉的声音，营造出一种怪异而令人不安的感觉。这里的恐惧并非直接式的突然惊吓，而是让你感到紧张与神秘，仿佛画面中有什么不对劲，又像是在观看一段被封禁的旧录像。这类视频最大的特点在于它们给人一种熟悉却又令人焦虑的感觉，仿佛记忆本身也变得令人恐惧。

Isu “Pocong Bersajam” Ramai Dibicarakan Warga Beredar informasi di media sosial mengenai sosok “pocong bersajam” yang disebut terlihat di wilayah Kaliangkrik hingga Sambak Kajoran, Magelang. Informasi tersebut kini ramai diperbincangkan warga dan memicu kekhawatiran di sejumlah wilayah sekitar. Masyarakat diimbau untuk tetap tenang, tidak mudah terpancing isu yang belum terverifikasi, serta menghindari penyebaran informasi yang belum dipastikan kebenarannya. Apabila menemukan aktivitas mencurigakan atau berpotensi mengganggu keamanan lingkungan, warga disarankan segera melapor kepada aparat setempat atau pihak berwajib. Tetap jaga keamanan lingkungan dan aktifkan ronda malam demi menjaga situasi tetap kondusif. 📹: B3doel___ #peristiwa #viralpost #pocong #magelang #jawatengah

Modus ini diduga dipakai untuk menakut-nakuti warga agar situasi sepi, sehingga pelaku lebih leluasa melakukan aksi pencurian atau perampokan. #Pocong #Viral #ModusKriminal #BeritaViral #fyp

d: Teror pocong jadi-jadian yang sempat meresahkan Jabodetabek kini dilaporkan muncul di Jawa Timur. Di Pasuruan, sosok pocong tersebut berhasil diamankan warga, sementara di Lamongan aksinya terekam kamera dan memicu keresahan masyarakat. Aksi ini dikhawatirkan sebagai modus kejahatan dengan memanfaatkan rasa takut warga, terutama di lokasi sepi pada malam hari. Gimana menurut lo ERAmania?🤔 #Eradotid #BikinPahamBikinNyaman #jawatimur

d: Sosok 'pocong' yang viral meneror Warga di salah satu RT Desa Tumenggungan, Kecamatan Lamongan akhirnya terungkap. Dua remaja pelaku prank pocong diamankan. Dua remaja itu masing-masing berinisial MA (17) dan AB (17). Keduanya kemudian diamankan dan dimintai klarifikasi setelah video tersebut ramai beredar di media sosial dan memicu keresahan warga. Dalam pengakuannya, MA berperan sebagai pocong mengaku hanya mengikuti ajakan temannya untuk membuat konten iseng. "Disuruh jadi pocong dengan sedikit dipaksa," kata MA saat dimintai keterangan, Sabtu (23/5/2026). Sementara AB bertugas yang merekam sekaligus disebut sebagai penggagas aksi prank. Sama, AB juga meminta maaf kepada masyarakat karena videonya telah membuat resah warga Lamongan. Baca berita selengkapnya hanya di detik.com ! Foto: Dua remaja pembuat video pocong jadi-jadian di Lamongan diamankan (dok. Istinewa) Creator: Jo #Pocong #lamongan #prank #detikcom

Yang Lagi Rame, Penampakan yang paling bikin geger‼️ Warga Desa Tumenggungan, Kecamatan Lamongan, Jawa Timur, sempat digegerkan oleh video viral di media sosial yang memperlihatkan sosok diduga pocong berdiri di pinggir gang gelap pada Jumat dini hari (22/5/2026). Rekaman yang diambil dari kejauhan tersebut sempat memicu ketakutan, keresahan, serta berbagai isu mistis di tengah masyarakat. Ketua RT setempat, Huda, dan salah seorang warga bernama Faisol membenarkan adanya kehebohan tersebut, meskipun saat itu kebenaran mengenai sosok penampakan itu belum bisa dipastikan. Menindaklanjuti keresahan warga, Polres Lamongan segera melakukan investigasi dan berhasil mengungkap bahwa teror tersebut hanyalah aksi iseng dari dua pelajar di bawah umur berinisial MAB dan MMA. Pelaku menggunakan dua buah sarung putih untuk membuat video pocong abal-abal tersebut dengan tujuan menakut-nakuti teman mereka. Karena statusnya yang masih di bawah umur, polisi bersama pihak RT dan orang tua mengambil langkah pembinaan terhadap kedua pelaku, sementara masyarakat diimbau untuk tidak mudah percaya serta tidak menyebarkan informasi hoaks yang belum jelas kebenarannya. . . Adakah orang Lamongan dimari⁉️ .  .  .  .  . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . #mistisworld #horor #hororindonesia #penampakan #fypシ

Kadang di tengah suasana yang tegang akibat isu pocong yang tengah viral, ditambah sumber dan validitas informasinya yang belum dapat dibuktikan, warga jadi ikut resah dan kepikiran. Karena itu, sedikit hiburan kadang memang dibutuhkan agar suasana tidak makin mencekam. Apalagi di era media sosial sekarang, kreativitas netizen sering kali justru jadi “penyelamat mood” di tengah ramainya isu viral. Berikut kami kumpulkan kompilasi “Pocong Core”,yang siap bikin senyum tipis hingga ketawa lepas. 😆

Malam mencekam di Kampung Mujul, Kayumanis, Tanah Sareal, Kota Bogor. Warga dibuat panik setelah muncul dugaan teror pocong yang belakangan ramai viral di media sosial. Kerumunan warga sampai pihak keamanan turun langsung ke lokasi untuk memastikan kejadian yang bikin heboh semalam. Sebelumnya, aksi serupa juga sempat bikin resah warga Bekasi dan Tangerang. Fenomena ini langsung memicu perdebatan. Ada yang percaya, ada juga yang menduga cuma aksi prank atau konten demi viral. Warga Bogor khususnya Kayumanis dan sekitarnya, semalam ada yang lihat langsung kejadian ini? Tulis kesaksian kalian di kolom komentar. #pojokbogor #kayumanis #terorpocong #beritabogor

Viral!!! Video Teror Pocong Jadi-jadian Kini Makin Marak Diberbagai daerah. Fenomena "pocong jadi-jadian" kini marak di berbagai daerah dan semakin meresahkan masyarakat. Aksi yang semula dianggap iseng ini disinyalir menjadi modus baru pelaku kejahatan untuk melancarkan aksi pencurian. Warga yang geram mulai melakukan ronda malam dengan membawa senjata tajam seperti golok sebagai bentuk perlindungan diri. Khawatir akan terjadinya aksi main hakim sendiri, pihak kepolisian di sejumlah daerah kini mulai turun tangan dengan meningkatkan patroli intensif. Aparat mengimbau masyarakat untuk berhati-hati dan segera melapor jika melihat aktivitas mencurigakan. Pelaku yang menggunakan kedok mistis untuk tindak kriminal dipastikan akan diproses hukum secara tegas. #fyp #viral #pocong
Sebuah video memperlihatkan sosok pocok yang sempat meresahkan warga akhirnya tertangkap polisi. Pocong tersebut tak berkutik saat aksinya gagal dan dipergoki warga.

Polres Tangerang Selatan melalui Polsek Ciputat Timur memberikan klarifikasi terkait viralnya isu teror pocong yang sempat meresahkan warga di wilayah Ciputat Timur dan sekitarnya. Kapolsek Ciputat Timur, Kompol Bambang Askar Sodiq menegaskan informasi yang beredar di media sosial tersebut tidak benar dan tidak ditemukan adanya kejadian yang mengarah pada aksi teror sebagaimana yang disebutkan warganet. (TribunTangerang.com/Ikhwana Mutuah Mico) SUMBER: https://tangerang.tribunnews.com/tangerang-selatan/57985/isu-pocong-di-ciputat-timur-tangsel-terungkap-ternyata-pengamen-cosplay Jangan lupa follow akun sosial media TribunTangerang.com untuk mendapatkan beragam informasi terkini dan updatenya:  YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tribuntangerang Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/TribunnewsTangerang/ Saluran WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaZ0fhb3LdQSSdO9AS1s TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@tribuntangerang?lang=en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tribun.tangerang/ #video #viral #pocong #ciputat #tangsel

Viral Penampakan Pocong di Tangerang: Teror Hantu atau Modus Kejahatan? Tangerang – Media sosial kembali ramai dibuat heboh oleh isu penampakan pocong di wilayah Tangerang Raya sejak awal pekan ini. Video dan foto yang beredar menunjukkan sosok berbalut kain putih mirip pocong gentayangan di malam hari, membuat warga resah dan ketakutan.  Menurut laporan yang beredar, sosok pocong ini muncul di beberapa kecamatan seperti Sepatan, Teluknaga, Rajeg, Cipondoh, Pakuhaji, hingga Sukadiri di Kabupaten Tangerang, bahkan merembet ke wilayah Ciputat, Tangerang Selatan. Warga melaporkan pocong mengetuk pintu rumah, berdiri di pinggir jalan, hingga tergantung di pohon.  Salah satu video viral memperlihatkan warga berkerumun di bawah pohon sambil menunjuk ke arah sosok putih. Video lain menunjukkan warga menangkap seorang pria yang diduga pocong jadi-jadian pada Rabu (20/5/2026) dini hari. Suasana sempat memanas karena massa hampir mengamuk terhadap pelaku.  Klarifikasi Polisi Polisi menyatakan bahwa banyak dari isu ini merupakan hoaks. Kapolsek di beberapa wilayah seperti Cipondoh dan Pakuhaji sudah membantah adanya penampakan asli. Namun, polisi juga sedang menyelidiki penyebar video tersebut karena diduga ada modus kejahatan. Kepala Seksi Humas Polresta Tangerang, Ipda Sandro, mengatakan pihaknya masih mendalami motif di balik video viral ini. Beberapa kasus pocong yang tertangkap ternyata hanya orang yang menyamar, salah satunya pengamen yang menggunakan kostum cosplay.  Reaksi Warga Banyak warga yang ketakutan, terutama di daerah pedesaan. Beberapa di antaranya memilih tidak keluar rumah pada malam hari. Di sisi lain, netizen ramai berkomentar dengan campuran antara ketakutan, humor, dan kecurigaan bahwa ini hanya trik untuk mencuri atau sekadar konten viral. Hingga saat ini, polisi mengimbau masyarakat agar tidak panik dan tidak menyebarkan informasi yang belum terverifikasi. Warga diminta melapor ke pihak berwenang jika melihat hal mencurigakan. Kasus ini mengingatkan kita bahwa di era media sosial, sebuah isu mistis bisa menyebar sangat cepat dan menciptakan keresahan massal. Apakah ini benar-benar penampakan atau sekadar ulah manusia, polisi masih terus melakukan penyelidikan. Update: Pantau terus perkembangannya, jangan mudah terprovokasi! Tetap waspada dan gunakan akal sehat. 👻

Duh, pocong beralih profesi jadi modus kriminal?! 😱 Lagi ramai banget nih video "pocong" keliling komplek dan ngetok rumah warga di Tangerang. Tapi kata polisi, ini bukan mistis! Melainkan taktik pelaku kriminal biar warga ketakutan, jadi mereka bisa leluasa maling atau merampok. Kalian sendiri masih percaya ginian atau udah tahu ini cuma prank atau modus? Mungkinkah mahluk halus bersemayam di lingkungan sekolah⁉️ Dalam kepercayaan masyarakat Indonesia, terutama dalam cerita rakyat Jawa dan Nusantara, lingkungan sekolah kadang dianggap bisa menjadi tempat bersemayam mahluk halus. Hal ini biasanya dikaitkan dengan bangunan tua, ruang kosong yang jarang dipakai, pohon besar, atau lokasi sekolah yang dahulu memiliki sejarah tertentu. Cerita seperti suara langkah kaki di malam hari, kelas kosong yang terasa angker, atau penampakan sosok misterius sering berkembang dari pengalaman pribadi, cerita turun-temurun, maupun sugesti kolektif antar siswa dan penjaga sekolah. Karena sekolah biasanya sepi pada malam hari dan memiliki banyak sudut sunyi, suasananya mudah memunculkan kesan mistis bagi sebagian orang. Dari sudut pandang logis, suasana sekolah yang gelap, sunyi, dan penuh gema memang dapat memengaruhi psikologis manusia. Rasa takut, kelelahan, stres, atau sugesti setelah mendengar cerita horor bisa membuat seseorang salah menafsirkan suara, bayangan, atau gerakan tertentu. Bangunan lama juga sering menghasilkan bunyi alami akibat angin, kayu memuai, atau instalasi yang sudah tua. Karena itu, pengalaman yang dianggap mistis belum tentu menjadi bukti adanya mahluk halus, melainkan bisa berasal dari kombinasi kondisi lingkungan dan persepsi manusia itu sendiri. . . Ada yg pernah ngalamin hal agak lain di Sekolah⁉️ .  .  .  .  . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . #mistisworld #horor #hororindonesia #penampakan #fypシ

d: Lagu hits-nya berjudul "Aku Tak Biasa", tapi akhir hidup sang Diva justru dipaksa berakhir di sebuah kamar hotel secara sangat tidak biasa. 🥀✨ Kasusnya "Selesai" oleh hukum, tapi kenapa bukti fisik di tubuhnya justru berbicara sebaliknya?💔 Kepergian Alda Risma menyisakan misteri, mulai dari temuan buku harian, kesaksian yang membingungkan, hingga vonis ringan pelaku yang terasa janggal bagi publik.  Namun, hanya dinding sunyi di Kamar 432 yang tahu pasti, kebenaran mengerikan apa yang sebenarnya terjadi pada malam itu. 🕯️ #AldaRisma #AkuTakBiasa #MisteriKamar432 #Konspirasi #KasusAldaRisma
zh: 她的热门歌曲名为"我不寻常"，这位天后的生命终点却以极不寻常的方式在一间酒店客房画上句号。案件在法律上已"结案"，但她身上的物证为何指向截然相反的结论？阿尔达·里斯玛的离世留下重重谜团：日记的发现、相互矛盾的证词，以及令公众感到蹊跷的轻判。然而，只有432号房间那堵沉默的墙知道，那晚究竟发生了怎样可怕的真相。

d: Update rumah yang terbakar misterius: mistis vs logika. Banyak yang bilang ini santet, banaspati, kiriman orang, aura negatif, sampai ada yang bilang ada orang yang tidak senang. Jujur, semua omongan itu malah bikin saya makin penasaran buat cari penyebab aslinya. Dan ternyata, tidak ada satupun yang benar. Setelah mengalami serangkaian kejadian api muncul hingga 12 kali di tempat yang berbeda-beda dengan volume api yang juga berbeda, akhirnya kasus ini menemukan titik terang. Penyebabnya diduga berasal dari kebocoran pipa saluran septic tank yang mengeluarkan gas methana. Gas tersebut merambat keluar melalui retakan atau nat keramik hingga memicu munculnya api di beberapa titik. Penanganan dan pencarian penyebab kejadian ini juga dibantu oleh pihak-pihak terkait. Terima kasih untuk @redkar_sleman, @geganajogja, dan semua rekan yang sudah terlibat dalam membantu penyelesaian kasus ini. Teruslah berlogika, sampai hal mistis tidak lagi mudah dipercaya. (Mr.tegas) #jogja #Yogyakarta #tiktokgogempar
zh: 神秘失火民宅追踪：玄学还是科学？众说纷纭，有人说是巫术、火灵、他人诅咒、负能量，也有人说是遭人嫉恨所致。坦白说，这些说法反而让我更想找出真正原因。最终结果是：没有一种说法是正确的。火情先后在不同位置出现多达12次、火势大小各异，经过一系列调查，案件终于迎来转机。起火原因疑为化粪池管道泄漏所排出的甲烷气体，气体通过瓷砖裂缝或缝隙向外扩散，在多处引发明火。案件的处置与溯源工作得到相关各方协助，感谢@redkar_sleman、@geganajogja及所有参与其中的同仁。坚持用逻辑思考，让玄学不再轻易令人信服。（Mr.Tegas）

d: น่ากลัวสุดขั้ว...หลอนสมองตึงสุดขีด นี่สิ #หนังผี ของจริง!! #ผีเข้า คือส่วนผสมของ "The Wailing"(2016) , "The Innkeepers" (2011) และ "The Skeleton Key" (2005) หยังยั่วล้อคนดูด้วย "เสียง" และ "ภาพ" ได้อย่างชาญฉลาด...รู้ว่าตรงไหนควรบิ้ว ตรงไหนควรเงียบ หาได้ยากมากในยุคที่หนังผีแห่ประโคมซาวด์จนหูแทบแตกและสาดใส่ฉากตุ้งแช่แบบผิวเผิน แต่สำหรับเรื่องนี้...การมีอยู่ของ "ผี" กลับเสียดสีสังคมได้อย่างแนบเนียน ในโลกจะมีคนอยู่สามประเภท "ไม่เชื่อเลย" / "คิดว่าเชื่อ" และ "เชื่อหมดใจ"   ซึ่งหนังได้หยิบนำมุมมองของคนทั้ง 3 แบบนี้มาผูกปมเป็นจนเป็นบทที่ดูแล้วงงเป็นไก่ตาแตก ก่อนจะตกตะกอนในเวลาต่อมาสักครึ่งชั่วโมงและพบว่า....มันโคตรสุดยอดไปเลยจริงๆครับ มีซ้ำรอบสองแน่นอนเพราะยังมีปมที่ค้างคาใจให้ค้นหาอีกหลายจุด กล้าพูดได้เต็มปากว่านี่แหล่ะ "หนังผีที่ดี"  ไปดูครับ ขอแนะนำเป็นที่สุด!! ....เข้าฉาย 21 พฤษภาคมนี้ในโรงภาพยนตร์เท่านั้น #รีวิว #หนัง #ไทบ้าน ป.ล.หนังไม่ไเกี่ยวกับจักรวาล " #ไทบ้านเดอะซีรี่ส์" นะครับ...แค่อยู่ในค่ายและทีมโปรดักชั่นเดียวกันเฉยๆ เรื่องนี้ไม่มีตลกมีแต่หลอน กับ หลอนโคตรๆ
h: หนังผี, ผีเข้า, รีวิว, หนัง, ไทบ้าน, ไทบ้านเดอะซีรี่ส์
zh: 极致恐怖、令人头皮发麻的真正佳作！融合了《哭声》（2016）、《旅馆守门人》（2011）与《骷髅钥匙》（2005）的精髓，用"声音"与"画面"巧妙撩拨观众……懂得何时该积累张力、何时该归于寂静。在鬼片滥用音效和廉价吓人镜头的当下，这部影片中"鬼"的存在却以极为细腻的方式讽刺了社会。世界上存在三种人："完全不信"/"以为自己信"与"全心全意相信"，影片将这三种视角编织成令人一头雾水的剧情，半小时后逐渐清晰，令人拍案叫绝！必看二刷，因为还有许多未解之谜。这才是真正的好鬼片，强烈推荐！5月21日起限定院线上映。附注：本片与"泰村宇宙"无关，只是出自同一制作团队，没有喜剧成分，只有纯粹的恐惧。

d: Filipino horror understands something most horror cinema ignores: the family unit is the most fertile ground for dread. These six films weaponize love, obligation, and blood ties until they become unbearable. 1. Sukob (2006): This film plants supernatural punishment directly inside wedding and funeral rituals, making every family milestone feel like a trap waiting to close. 2. Feng Shui (2004): A cursed bagua mirror systematically destroys a working-class family from the inside, grounding its supernatural terror in the very domestic spaces meant to feel safe. 3. Sigaw (2004): An apartment building becomes a closed loop of inherited domestic violence, where the horror is less about ghosts and more about cycles no family escapes. 4. Patayin sa Sindak si Barbara (1974): One of the earliest Filipino horror films to frame jealousy and obsession as forces that outlast death, with a revenge arc rooted entirely in family betrayal. 5. Manananggal in Manila (1997): It smuggles genuine monster mythology into an urban family setting, using the manananggal creature as a literalization of what women sacrifice to survive. 6. Corazon: Ang Unang Aswang (2012): A period-set aswang origin story that reframes the most feared creature in Filipino folklore as the product of grief, isolation, and a marriage pushed past its breaking point. . . . #filipinohorror #horrormovies #asianhorror #horrorlist #foreignhorror
zh: 菲律宾恐怖片深谙一件大多数恐怖电影忽视的事：家庭才是恐惧最滋生的土壤。以下六部影片将爱、责任与血缘化为武器，令人窒息。1.《Sukob》（2006）：将超自然惩罚植入婚礼与葬礼仪式，让每一个家庭里程碑都像一个等待闭合的陷阱。2.《风水》（2004）：一面诅咒八卦镜从内部系统性地摧毁一个工薪家庭，将超自然恐怖植根于本应安全的家居空间。3.《Sigaw》（2004）：一栋公寓楼成为家庭暴力代代相传的封闭循环，恐怖的核心不是鬼魂，而是家庭无法逃脱的轮回。4.《P

d: Reyna Manalo observed a creature from her window at approximately 10 PM, in the Pampanga Province in the Philippines. Regional documentation  identifies the creature as an Aswang — a shape-shifting entity. Reyna stated, “It was as if it was looking right into my soul with those yellow beady eyes.” The creature was standing upright outside her window and appeared to be gesturing for her to come outside. Reyna applied a traditional coconut oil preparation reported in regional documentation to have protective properties against Aswang contact. The beast retreated shortly after the oil was administered. #aswang #philippines #folklore #cryptid #paranormal
zh: 雷纳·马纳洛晚上约10点在菲律宾邦板牙省透过窗户看到一个生物，当地记录将其认定为阿斯万——一种变形实体。她说："它用那双黄色的小眼睛直视着我的灵魂。"那生物直立站在窗外，似乎在示意她出去。雷纳涂抹了当地记载具有抵御阿斯万效果的传统椰子油，随后怪物退去。

d: I wonder what kind of nurse I would be if I stayed in the Philippines. Maybe I’d be climbing the clinical ladder, maybe I’d start a business. Knowing myself, I know I’d still strive But I also wonder if I’d have the same mindset I have now. Moving abroad at 23 forced me to learn things early—especially finances, saving, thinking long term. I don’t know if I would’ve developed that as quickly if I stayed. At the same time, I can’t ignore what I gave up. I cannot count how many weddings, birthdays, random hangouts, milestones I missed with people I love; moments you simply don’t get back. And honestly, when I visit my home country, there are times when I feel like I’ve outgrown them or that I am out of place.  You can’t have everything. Every decision comes with a price. Moving abroad gave me opportunities, but it also meant spending a big part of my 20s figuring life out on my own. If you’re thinking about leaving home, just know it’s not just a career move but a trade-off. #nurses #nursinglife #immigrant #ofw #philippines
zh: 我有时会想，如果我留在菲律宾，会成为怎样的护士。也许会一步步晋升，也许会创业。了解自己的我知道，我仍然会努力奋斗。但我也想知道，我是否还会拥有现在这样的思维方式。23岁就出国，让我很早就学会了很多事——尤其是理财、储蓄和长远规划。如果留下来，我不知道是否能发展得这么快。但同时，我无法忽视自己放弃的东西。我错过了太多婚礼、生日、随意的聚会、那些与我爱的人共度的重要时刻，那些再也找不回来的瞬间。而且说实话，每次回国，有时会感觉自己和他们之间已经有了距离，格格不入。鱼与熊掌不可兼得，每个决定都有代价。出国给了我机会，但也意味着我用了大半个二十多岁的时间独自摸索人生。如果你正在考虑离开家乡，请记住，这不只是一个职业选择，而是一场取舍。

d: A Mangkukulam is a Filipino witch or sorcerer known for practicing kulam, a form of traditional folk magic or black magic in the Philippines. Rooted deeply in pre-colonial beliefs, the mangkukulam is feared for their ability to inflict curses, illness, misfortune, or even death often from afar using rituals, spells, and cursed objects. #mythology #mystery #myth #mangkukulam #witch
zh: Mangkukulam是菲律宾的巫师或术士，以施行kulam（一种菲律宾传统民间魔法或黑魔法）而闻名。其根植于前殖民时代的信仰，人们畏惧他们通过仪式、咒语和诅咒物从远处降祸、致病、带来厄运甚至死亡的能力。

zh: 如果真正令人恐惧的不是诅咒本身，而是被指控施咒的人呢？从窃窃私语的名字到魔鬼鱼尾的刺痛，Mangkukulam的故事或许比我们想象的更黑暗。

d: "Mangkukulam" In Philippine folklore, a mangkukulam is a person, often depicted as a witch, who practices kulam, a form of black magic or witchcraft, and can cast spells or curses on others. They are known for using rituals, potions, and even voodoo dolls to inflict harm, illness, or misfortune on their victims. While often associated with negative actions, some mangkukulam are also believed to use their powers for healing or herbal magic, similar to an albularyo (witch doctor). #Mangkukulam #Philippines #Horror #Monster #Trending #Viral #AI #Veo3 #FYP
h: mangkukulam, philippines, horror, monster, trending, viral, ai, veo3, fyp
zh: "Mangkukulam"——在菲律宾民间传说中，Mangkukulam通常被描绘为施行kulam（一种黑魔法或巫术）的人，能够对他人下咒或施加诅咒。他们以使用仪式、药水乃至巫毒娃娃来伤害、致病或带来厄运而著称。虽然常与负面行为挂钩，但也有人认为部分Mangkukulam会用其能力进行治愈或草药魔法，类似于albularyo（巫医）。

zh: 如何消灭一个Mangkukulam？Mangkukulam种类各异，消灭他们的方法也不尽相同。对于其肉身，最有效的方式是焚烧。但这并不意味着Mangkukulam死后其所施的诅咒也会随之消失。事实上，若施咒的Mangkukulam已死，诅咒反而更难解除……

d: rush hours 3 dressing room scene 😄 Chris tucker funny moments In Rush Hour 3, Carter and Lee are investigating the Triads, and their search leads them to a fancy nightclub. Carter, being his usual bold and comedic self, decides to take the lead. He wanders into the dancers' dressing room, where the women are all getting ready for their performance, some of them half-dressed. To avoid suspicion, Carter starts acting like he's part of the management or their dance crew. He hilariously introduces himself as part of the "Z-Block" and starts hyping up the dancers, throwing out random dance instructions and compliments as if he's their choreographer. His confidence and ridiculous energy make the scene unforgettable. What makes it even funnier is how Carter interacts with the dancers-they're confused but go along with his antics, and his over-the-top behavior just keeps escalating. The whole moment is classic Chris Tucker, blending charm, humor, and improvisation, making it one of the most iconic scenes in the movie #RushHour2 #ChrisTucker #ZBlock #FunnyMoments #MovieScenes #ComedyGold #IconicMovies #FYP #ForYou #ViralVideo #TrendingNow #TikTokComedy #ThrowbackMovies #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fypp #fyp #fypage #foryoupage #foryoupageofficiall #tiktok #commedy #commedyvedio #commedytiktok

d: @realpicklelife is doing a dance to a slowed version of Wiggle by Jason Derulo featuring Snoop Dogg, turning a real-life pickle into a full throwback dance meme. The slowed-down beat, funny pickle movement, and classic Wiggle hook make this feel smooth, ridiculous, and instantly ready for TikTok green screen edits. What makes this work is the contrast. Wiggle already has that playful 2010s party energy, but slowing it down and giving the spotlight to @realpicklelife makes the pickle look weirdly dramatic, confident, and locked into every move. It has that perfect “why does this pickle actually go hard?” vibe where nostalgia, dance humor, and pickle aura all collide. Use this CapCut template for green screen jokes, pickle memes, dance remakes, or any post where you want something random to carry the whole beat. It works especially well for slowed Wiggle edits, Jason Derulo memes, Snoop Dogg sound posts, funny reaction videos, and TikTok FYP clips where the pickle steals the entire vibe. d: that’s my massage 😂 Kanye West’s iconic “massage” moment became a viral meme when, during an interview, he was asked if he had a message for the world and mistakenly said, “Well, they asked me, did I have a massage to share with the world.” The humorous slip quickly spread across social media, with fans and meme creators embracing the unexpected mix-up. This moment highlights Kanye’s unfiltered and often unpredictable nature in public appearances, adding to his legacy of memorable interviews. Despite the mistake, it only fueled his status as a pop culture phenomenon, proving that even his missteps can become legendary. #reels #funny #celebrity
zh: 那是我的按摩——侃爷经典"按摩"时刻成为爆红表情包，采访中被问是否有话要对世界说，他却说成了"按摩"。这个口误迅速在社交媒体上广泛传播，充分体现了他在公开场合不加掩饰、难以预料的风格，也为其留下了又一段难忘的采访记录，证明连他的口误都能成为传奇。

d: Sinopsis: Seorang siswa SMA yang ceria dan penuh semangat jatuh cinta pada pandangan pertama dengan seorang siswi yang dikenal dingin dan sulit didekati. Meski berkali-kali ditolak dengan tegas, ia tidak menyerah dan terus melakukan berbagai upaya unik serta konyol untuk meluluhkan hati sang "dewi" sekolah. Di tengah dinamika persahabatan remaja yang penuh tawa dan drama, akankah ketulusannya mampu meruntuhkan tembok pertahanan sang gadis, ataukah cinta ini hanya akan menjadi kenangan masa sekolah yang bertepuk sebelah tangan? A cheerful and energetic high school student falls in love at first sight with a girl known for her cold and distant personality. Despite being rejected multiple times, he refuses to give up and continues to try unique and hilarious ways to melt the "school goddess's" heart. Amidst the dynamics of teenage friendships filled with laughter and drama, will his sincerity manage to break down her walls, or will this love just become a one-sided memory of their school days? #LoveRevolution #ParkJiHoon #LeeRuby #YoungHoon #TheBoyz #RekomendasiDrakor #SchoolRomance #WebDrama #KdramaEdit #DrakorSeru #DramaKorea #GongJuYoung #WangJaRim #FypIndonesia #GlobalFyp #AsianDrama
zh: 简介：一个开朗活力的高中男生对冷漠难以接近的女生一见钟情，屡遭拒绝却屡败屡战，用各种奇葩搞笑的方式追求"校园女神"。在充满欢笑与狗血的青春友情中，他的真诚能否打动她，还是最终只留下一段单相思的校园记忆？

d: Ada yang dulu bela-belain beli kalung yang liontinnya bisa dibuka? 😂 || Salah satu sinetron yang mampu menyedot perhatian penonton kala itu, yakni sinetron bertajuk Liontin. Tayang perdana pada 6 Juni 2005 silam, sinetron ini sukses besar.  Liontin sendiri merupakan sebuah sinetron remaja yang menceritakan tentang kehidupan kakak beradik Indy dan Manda, yang diperankan oleh Nana dan Naysilla Mirdad. Di sinetron Liontin ini Nay berperan sebagai perempuan bernama Indy yang terpisah dengan sang kakak saat kecil.  Kemudian Nay pun bertemu lagi dengan sang kakak setelah dewasa dan tidak menyadari mereka memiliki liontin yang sama. Keduanya diketahui harus berpisah usai ibu dan ayahnya meninggal dunia untuk mencari keberadaan sang kakek.  Sebelum keduanya pergi untuk mencari sang kakek, Manda sempat memberikan sebuah kalung dengan liontin bertuliskan nama sang ibunda, Rianty, kepada sang adik. #liontin #sinetron #nanamirdad #naysillamirdad #transformasi #transformasi90
h: liontin, sinetron, nanamirdad, naysillamirdad, transformasi, transformasi90
zh: 有没有人当年专门去买那种坠子可以打开的项链？那部曾经吸引大批观众的电视剧叫做《吊坠》，首播于2005年6月6日，大获成功。《吊坠》是一部青春剧，讲述姐妹Indy和Manda的生活故事，由Nana和Naysilla Mirdad出演。剧中Nay饰演的Indy幼年与姐姐走散，长大后重逢却不知道彼此拥有同一块吊坠。父母相继离世后，两人为寻找外祖父而分离，临别前姐姐Manda将一条刻有母亲名字Rianty的项链送给了妹妹。

d: #gossip #storytime #talk #grwm #alertshub

A lot of people talk about others because it distracts them from facing themselves. Gossip can make people feel entertained, included, or temporarily better about their own problems. But in the long run, people who constantly talk about others rarely build anything meaningful for themselves. Real growth comes when you focus less on people’s lives and more on your own purpose, peace, and progress. Not every opinion deserves your attention, and not every conversation deserves your energy.
zh: 很多人喜欢谈论别人，因为这让他们逃避面对自己。八卦能让人感到娱乐、融入群体，或暂时忘记自身的烦恼。但从长远来看，总是议论别人的人很少能为自己建立有意义的东西。真正的成长在于少关注别人的生活，多专注自己的目标、内心平静与进步。不是每个观点都值得你在意，也不是每段对话都值得你消耗精力。

d: #Miesposalabillonaria #dramascoreanos

really gave one of the most emotional fantasy love stories. The scene where Genie looks at Ka-young and quietly asks, “You’ll come save me, right, my master?” hit so differently. And when she realizes he’s leaving, the pain in her eyes says everything without even needing words. 💔 But the moment that completely broke me was when Genie smiled and said, “Don’t worry… I would never lose to anyone except you.” That line wasn’t just romantic, it showed how deeply he loved her. Even after everything, he still chose sacrifice over his own happiness. Their relationship started with wishes and destiny, but in the end it became a story about love, pain, and protecting the person you care about the most. The chemistry, the emotions, and the heartbreaking sacrifice made this scene unforgettable. ✨ Starring: • Kim Woo-bin as Genie / Iblis • Bae Suzy as Ki Ka-young Available on Netflix #GenieMakeAWish #KimWooBin #BaeSuzy #KDrama #KoreanDrama #FantasyDrama #EmotionalScene #Heartbreaking #TrueLove #KDramaEdit #DramaLover #SadScene #RomanticDrama #KdramaAddict #LoveStory #EmotionalMoments #NetflixKdrama #KoreanActors #DramaEdit #CoupleGoals
zh: 这部剧呈现了最动人的奇幻爱情故事之一。灯神望着佳英轻声问"你会来救我的，对吗，我的主人？"这一幕令人心碎。当她意识到他即将离去，她眼中的痛苦无需言语便说明了一切。而最让我崩溃的瞬间，是灯神微笑着说："别担心……我只会输给你一个人。"这句话不只是浪漫，更展现了他爱之深沉。两人的羁绊始于愿望与命运，终成一段关于爱、痛苦与守护的故事。主演：金宇彬饰灯神/恶魔，裴秀智饰奇佳英。Netflix播出。

d: หลายคนต่างคุ้นหน้าคุ้นตากันดี สำหรับ #แม็คปวิช เวียงนนท์ พระเอกหนุ่มจากละครดังของช่อง 3 เรื่อง “นางฟ้าอสูร”  ก่อนหน้านี้ แม็ค เคยออกมาเปิดใจให้สัมภาษณ์ถึงเรื่องลูก ทำเอาทุกคนต่างเซอร์ไพรส์กันอย่างมาก ซึ่ง แม็ค เผย ณ ตอนนั้นว่า มีลูกสาววัย 5 เดือนแล้ว ไม่ได้ปิดบัง ยังคงใช้ชีวิตปกติ และแฮปปี้กับบทบาทคุณพ่อ ยอมรับชีวิตเปลี่ยนหลังมีลูก เลิกเที่ยว เลิกกินเหล้า ทุ่มเวลาทั้งหมดให้กับการเลี้ยงลูก รับงานน้อยลง เพื่อมีเวลาให้ลูกเต็มที่ สำหรับ แม็ค ปวิช เวียงนนท์ จบการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรี คณะศิลปศาสตร์ สาขา Business English มหาวิทยาลัยอัสสัมชัญ  จุดเริ่มต้นเข้าวงการบันเทิง เขาได้เข้าประกวดรายการ M Thailand ได้รับรางวัลรองชนะเลิศอันดับ 2 จากนั้นได้เซ็นสัญญาเป็นนักแสดงช่อง 3 มีผลงานการแสดงมาหลายเรื่อง และได้เป็นพระเอกเต็มตัวในละครเรื่องแรกคือ “นางฟ้าอสูร” เล่นคู่กับ แจ็คกี้ ชาเคอลีน มิ้นซ์  และล่าสุดในปี 2569 กำลังจะมีผลงานเรื่อง "ก็รักมันปักใจ" ทางช่อง 3
an: จารย์เสม เปิดประวัติ
zh: 许多人对他十分熟悉——Wieng Non，3频道热播剧《天使恶魔》男主。Mac此前曾公开谈及孩子一事，令众人大感惊讶。他透露当时已有一个5个月大的女儿，并不隐瞒，生活如常，享受为人父的角色，坦言有了孩子后人生改变，不再夜游饮酒，将全部时间投入育儿，接工作减少以陪伴孩子。Mac Pawit Wiengnon毕业于安假大学文学院商务英语专业，以参加M Thailand选秀出道，获得亚军，随后签约3频道，出演多部作品，并在《天使恶魔》中首次担纲男主，搭档Jackie Jacqueline Minz。最新消息，2026年将推出新剧《爱了就认定》，播出平台为3频道。

d: รายการ ดารา ไอดอล  “ โค้ชเปา ดังมา 15 ปี… คนรู้จักทั้งตลาด แต่ทำไมยังหาเงินจากออนไลน์ไม่ได้?” คลิปนี้คือเรื่องจริงของผู้หญิงคนหนึ่ง ที่มีชื่อเสียง มีคนติดตาม มีคนรัก แต่เคยติดลบ จนเกือบต้องกลับไปทำงานประจำอีกครั้ง… อะไรคือจุดเปลี่ยน ที่ทำให้เธอเปลี่ยน “ความดัง” ให้กลายเป็น “รายได้หลักแสน”  และทำไมคนที่มีผู้ติดตามอยู่แล้ว ถึงอาจมี “ทรัพย์” อยู่ในมือ โดยที่ตัวเองยังไม่รู้… คลิปนี้อาจเปลี่ยนมุมมองของคนที่ “ดังแล้ว แต่ยังไม่กล้าขาย” หรือ “มีตัวตนแล้ว แต่ยังไม่กล้าสร้างเงิน” ฟังให้จบ แล้วคุณอาจมองตัวเองไม่เหมือนเดิมอีกเลย ❤️ #ดาราไอดอล #แบรนด์ดารา #ขายออนไลน์ #shan #shantiktok #ครูซ่าเจ้าของแบรนด์ดารา

zh: 明星偶像节目："教练Pao出道15年，圈内无人不知，为何还是无法靠网络赚钱？"这段视频讲述一位女性的真实故事，她有名气、有粉丝、有人爱，却曾负债累累，几乎要重回朝九晚五，是什么转折点让她把"知名度"变成"月入数十万"，为何已有粉丝的人可能手握财富却浑然不知……这段视频或许会改变那些"已经出名却不敢卖货"或"已有影响力却不敢变现"的人的看法，听完你可能会对自己有全新的认识

Pov: when I see my crush 🌚🔥 F4 Thailand: Boys Over Flowers Genre: Romance, Comedy, Drama, School, Youth ✨  Episodes: 16 Release Date: December 18, 2021 – April 9, 2022  Main Cast / Actors: Bright Vachirawit Chivaaree as Thyme (Akira Paramaanantra) – the arrogant but secretly soft-hearted leader of F4 Tu Tontawan Tantivejakul as Gorya (Thitara Jundee) – a brave middle-class girl Dew Jirawat Sutivanichsak as Ren (Renrawin Aira) – calm, caring, and mysterious 🌷 Win Metawin Opas-iamkajorn as Kavin – charming playboy of F4 Nani Hirunkit Changkham as M.J. – loyal and fun member of F4  Full Description / Story: F4 Thailand follows Gorya, a simple girl from a middle-class family who gets admitted to a prestigious school full of rich and powerful students. The school is controlled by a famous group called F4—four handsome, wealthy boys feared by everyone. Their leader, Thyme, is rude, spoiled, and often bullies others. Everything changes when Gorya bravely stands up against F4’s unfair behavior. Instead of being scared, she fights back, which shocks everyone—especially Thyme. Soon, Thyme starts falling for her, but Gorya initially dislikes him because of his toxic attitude and instead develops feelings for the gentle and caring Ren. 💔❤️ As the story goes on, Thyme slowly changes himself for Gorya, and the drama explores love, friendship, bullying, family pressure, jealousy, heartbreak, and character growth. It’s a mix of funny, emotional, romantic, and dramatic moments with lots of chemistry and iconic scenes.  Fun Fact: This drama is the Thai adaptation of the famous Japanese manga Hana Yori Dango, also known as Boys Over Flowers, and many fans love it because of Bright, Dew, and the Thyme–Gorya chemistry 😭❤️  #f4thailand #crush #love #thaidrama #thymegorya

d: #teetee #teeteepor #thaibl #duangwithyouseries #fyp

This is clearly not (or at least shouldn't be) a hot take but I need to mention this.  It's one thing to force the top to act more masculine and the bottom to act more feminine but also pushing gender stareotypes towards them and talking as if they aren't both MEN. IS. WEIRD. In aspect of the QUEER community: the bl world is a big part of how people view same gender relationships and if fans keep pushing gender norms, it's how people will start to view same gender relationships. Especially when it keeps being pushed that there has to be a "wife" of the relationship. It's so harmful for people who have been fighting to beat the stareotypes for decades. For example, men who like the same gender for being too "feminine", literally being called as LESS OF A MAN for liking the same gender. Yet, fans are actively pushing for these bl couples to have a "baby girl" or a "wife", be serious. These actors and queer people don't deserve and shouldn't be judged based on their S3X POSITIONS.   In perspective of actors: they aren't able to express themselves without feeling like they won't be accepted unless they follow the seme/uke expectations. Having to be jealous, never being wrong if you're the bottom. What is the point of supporting different actors if you want all of them to act the same anyways. Ironically, the literal community fans seem to "support" stands for being true to yourselves. Especially for queer actors. Imagine that everyday you try to support your community and "supporters" just continue to tell you that you can't be feminine if you're a top?  #queer #lgbt #thaibl #fyp #porteeteepor
zh: 这显然不是什么争议观点，但我必须说：强迫攻表现得更阳刚、受表现得更阴柔是一回事，但把性别刻板印象强加给他们、把两个男人中的一方当"女方"来对待，真的很奇怪。从酷儿群体角度看：BL在很大程度上影响着大众对同性关系的认知，如果粉丝一直强化性别规范，人们就会以这种方式看待同性关系，这对几十年来一直在打破刻板印象的人伤害很深。从演员角度看：他们无法自由表达自我，因为一旦不符合攻受期待就会失去认可。支持不同演员却希望他们表现得一模一样，有什么意义呢？

d: seanshepard10 The Rock-afire Explosion at ShowBiz Pizza Place - Pensacola, Florida 1991 Snapper, way back in 1991. As a kid he had heard rumors that the show was going away and knew he had to get there and film what he could. Sadly, about two weeks after this was filmed, Concept Unification hit this store and the Rock-afire Explosion show was converted to Munch's Make Believe Band.. #showbizpizzac #chuckecheese #rockafireexplosion #pizzatimetheatre #animatronics
zh: 1991年佛罗里达州彭萨科拉的Showbiz Pizza Place里的Rock-afire Explosion表演。Snapper早在1991年就听说演出即将停办，便赶去拍下了能拍到的画面。遗憾的是，这段视频拍摄约两周后，该店推行"Concept Unification"改造，Rock-afire Explosion节目被更换为Munch's Make Believe Band。

d: El chisme muere cuando llega a oídos sabios. Porque la persona madura no lo alimenta. Lo corta. El chisme necesita reacción. Necesita emoción. Necesita que alguien lo repita. Cuando llega a alguien con carácter, se detiene. No porque no escuche… sino porque no participa. No todo lo que te cuentan merece tu voz. Guárdalo si te representa. Compártelo con quien lo necesita. Sígueme para más reflexiones. #parati #reflexiones #madurez #mentalidad #crecimientopersonal #inteligenciaemocional #valores #conciencia #psicologia #vida

d: Where was this job option during career day? 🤣 I figured I could share this side of the beauty industry for those who don’t know! The right haircut, facial hair, and styling make a world of difference on the red carpet or a magazine cover 🤩 . . . #celebritybeauty #celebrityhair #celebritymakeup #celebritygroomer

Tutorial membuat video AI Baby Dance Overdriveyang super viral 👶💃✨Efek trending untuk edit foto/video bayi: baby joget lucu + gerakan TikTok viral, dengan gaya overdrive penuh energi — hasilnya kelihatan gemas banget, cute, dan bikin ketawa! 😳💞“EFEK AI BAYI MENARI YANG DIPAKAI BANYAK ORANG DI TIKTOK 🚀Dari foto bayi biasa → jadi video joget overdrive yang hidup: gerakan sway, bounce, shake, tempo cepat ala trend TikTok, semuanya nyatu natural banget ✨📱AI akan mengubah foto bayi jadi anak kecil lucu yang menari otomatis, gerakan sinkron dengan musik (오버드라이브 댄스 효과 진짜 귀여워요 😆), tubuh proporsional, wajah tetap imut dan natural (без изменения лица ✅).Pencahayaan lembut, animasi halus, vibe fun & happy —cocok buat konten keluarga, FYP, reels, shorts, dan challenge viral (เหมาะมากสำหรับ TikTok & Reels 🎶🔥).Efek CapCut / Dreamina / Kling / Gemini: “AI Baby Dance Insert + Overdrive Motion” — hasilnya smooth, lucu, cinematic, dan super viral di sosial media! 🎬💥💗Cocok buat konten bayi lucu, video keluarga, baby motor skills trend, dan konten hiburan yang gampang tembus FYP! 🚀📱✨#AIBabyDance#klingai
#dreamina #dreaminapioneer #capcutpioneer

d: Mitos “bau tangan” pada bayi 😊 Banyak orang takut sering menggendong bayi karena katanya nanti bayi jadi “bau tangan”. Padahal secara medis, bayi menangis bukan karena “manja”, tetapi karena memang butuh: ❤️ rasa aman ❤️ kehangatan ❤️ sentuhan orang tuanya Menggendong bayi dengan penuh kasih tidak akan merusak bayi 😊 Yang justru perlu diperhatikan adalah: ✔️ Kebersihan tangan ✔️ Jangan menggendong saat sedang sakit ✔️ Pastikan bayi tetap nyaman dan aman Karena bagi bayi, pelukan orang tua adalah tempat ternyaman di dunia ❤️ 📌 Semua video dibuat dan diunggah dengan persetujuan tertulis pasien dan keluarga untuk tujuan edukasi, dan akan kami hapus jika diminta. Silakan share, tetapi dilarang mengunduh dan mengunggah ulang di akun lain. Segala sengketa akibat download dan reupload bukan tanggung jawab kami. 🔁 Share agar tidak salah paham. 💾 Simpan sebagai edukasi penting.
zh: 关于婴儿"被抱惯"的误区——很多人因为担心宝宝被"抱惯"而不敢常抱孩子。但从医学角度来说，宝宝哭不是因为"娇气"，而是真的需要：安全感、温暖和父母的抚触。用爱抱宝宝不会害了他。真正需要注意的是：保持手部清洁、生病时不要抱宝宝、确保宝宝舒适安全。对宝宝来说，父母的怀抱是世界上最温暖的地方。所有视频均经患者及家属书面同意后发布，仅供教育用途，如需删除请告知。请分享但禁止下载后在他处转发。

Jaranan, also known as Ebeg in Banyumas, is a captivating traditional dance from Indonesia that combines energetic movements with mysticism. Originating from the Banyumas region in Central Java, this dance is performed with woven bamboo horses, representing the strength and spirit of a warrior. Dancers enter a trance-like state, moving to the rhythms of gamelan music, often accompanied by chants and offerings. The performance is a mesmerizing blend of art and spirituality, celebrating local traditions while invoking ancient beliefs. Experience the vibrant energy and unique cultural heritage of Banyumas through this unforgettable art form. #Jaranan #EbegBanyumasan #JarananBanyumas #IndonesianCulture #BanyumasHeritage #TraditionalDance #IndonesianTradition #KudaLumping #CulturalDance #Indonesia

d: This girl went viral for having the most fun job in the world. Meet actress XIXI YU SAKANA, a professional motion capture artist who brings animated characters to life. Wearing a special suit equipped with sensors, she performs graceful and acrobatic movements that are transformed into lifelike animations for characters in video games and movies. SAKANA specializes in embodying different characters from many franchises, like her performance as Topaz from Honkai Star Rail where she plays with her pet Numby. Her work as Arlecchino from Genshin Impact is flawless, with her beautiful spear movements. SAKANA even provides insights into the characters. She mimics various actions and combat sequences and can create scenes with bows and arrows, swords, and guns in many different ways. She has the ability to convey emotions and expressions, as seen in this performance where she vividly captures the physical struggles of unbearable pain or a character being hit in scenes of battle. As a content creator, SAKANA recreates scenes from Disney movies, portraying princesses like Rapunzel from Tangled and the iconic Snow White. She also makes videos performing as characters from famous video games like Lara Croft from Tomb Raider, V from Cyberpunk 2077, Lady Dimitrescu from Resident Evil, Joel and Ellie from The Last of Us and even Arno from Assassin's Creed. ============= Xixi Yu SAKANA: - YT: SAKANA-cg6or - IG: xixiyu_sakana - TT: xixi.yu.c ============= Music from #Uppbeat https://uppbeat.io/t/ra/sunny
zh: 这位女孩因拥有全世界最有趣的工作而走红。她就是动作捕捉演员 XIXI YU SAKANA，一位让动画角色栩栩如生的专业动捕艺术家。她身穿配备传感器的特制服装，以优雅的动作和高难度技巧为游戏和电影中的角色注入生命。SAKANA 擅长诠释多个系列的角色，例如在《崩坏：星穹铁道》中扮演托帕并与松果儿互动，以及在《原神》中以完美的枪法演绎阿蕾奇诺。她不仅提供对角色的深入理解，还能还原弓箭、刀剑、枪械等各种战斗动作，并生动传达角色的情绪与表情，如逼真呈现战斗中承受剧痛的挣扎。作为内容创作者，她还重现了迪士尼电影场景，扮演《魔发奇缘》中的乐佩等经典公主，并出演《古墓丽影》的劳拉、《赛博朋克2077》的V、《生化危机》的迪米特雷斯库夫人、《最后生还者》的乔尔与艾莉，乃至《刺客信条》的阿尔诺等知名游戏角色。

d: Thousand Layer Apple 🍎✨ Inspired by the viral thousand layer potato, but with apples & a brown sugar cinnamon butter mixture. It’s SO GOOD, you guys!!  RECIPE: Makes 1:  1 large honeycrisp apple 3-4 tbsp melted butter 1 tbsp dark brown sugar 1 teaspoon cinnamon Peel and core your apple, then carefully slice into 1/16” slices with a knife or mandoline (the one we used here is linked on our amazon page). Combine melted butter, sugar, and cinnamon in a medium mixing bowl. Coat each slice with melted butter mixture and stack in a ramekin until you reach the top. Be sure to press down on the layers a few times throughout stacking and pour out the excess liquid back into your bowl. Once you’ve reached the top of your ramekin, move to a 400˚F oven for 10 minutes. After 10 minutes, carefully pour out the excess liquid in your ramekin and top your stack with a piece of puff pastry brushed with egg wash. Return to the oven for 20 minutes. For best results, let it cool completely before serving. Loosen your stack from the ramekin with a butter knife, and serve upside down with ice cream. #apple #apples #fallrecipes #baketok
zh: 千层苹果——受爆款千层土豆启发，以苹果搭配红糖肉桂黄油制作，超级好吃！食谱：1个大蜂蜜脆苹果，3-4汤匙融化黄油，1汤匙深红糖，1茶匙肉桂。苹果去皮去核后切成约1.6毫米薄片，与黄油混合料裹匀后叠放入小烤碗，压实并倒出多余液体。放入200°C烤箱烤10分钟，倒出多余液体，铺上刷了蛋液的酥皮再烤20分钟。完全

zh: 试试爆火炸鸡做法——酱油焖鸡食谱：鸡半只、盐1茶匙、少许姜黄粉；研磨料：红葱头3个、大蒜2瓣；其他配料：姜半寸（切片）、指天椒4个、大洋葱1个、番茄1个、咖喱叶2枝、蚝油2汤匙、辣椒酱2汤匙、甜浓酱油适量、少许水

Dendeng balado ✨ Cuss dagingnya dimasak gini aja , asli ueenak poll 😍 Dendeng Balado by : @dindinn02  Bahan rebus : ✅️ 500gr daging sapi (pilih bagian daging full) ✅️ 6 siung baput ukuran besar ✅️ 4 siung bamer ✅️ Sejempol Jahe ✅️ 2 sdt ketumbar ✅️ 2 buah sereh , geprek ✅️ Daun salam ✅️ Garam ✅️ air secukupnya untuk merebus ✅️ (Rebus sampai daging empuk , ini nanti hasil dagingnya enak wangi dan gk amis 👌 )  Bahan Balado : ✅️ 20 buah cabe merah ✅️ 8 cabe rawit ( boleh di skip kalau cabe merahnya sudah pedas ) ✅️ 8 siung bawang merah ✅️ (Di rebus sebentar lalu ulek kasar ) Bahan lainnya : ✅️ 8 siung bawang merah , iris ✅️ gula ,garam , dan kaldu bubuk secukupnya  ✅️ 4 asam jawa larutin disedikit air , ambil airnya saja ✅ Air rebusan daging secukupnya  #dendeng #dendengbalado #balado #sapi #resepsimple #dagingsapi #reseptiktok #idemasak #masakansimple #masak #foryou #foryoupage #fyp

d: Paling doyan banget kalo udah daging sapi dibikin tongseng kayak gini, sensasi kress kress kol dan rawitnya itu yg nikmat banget pas dimakan. Di rumah ini jadi menu paling favorit kitaaa, makin nendang lagi rasanya kalo masaknya pake Masako Sapi dari @asli_masako , bikin jadi makin berasa kaldu sapinya dan jadi lebih kaya rasa. TONGSENG SAPI ISTIMEWA By: @reystafauzia Bahan: - 700 gr daging sapi - 500 gr kol - 4 biji tomat - 20 biji cabe rawit utuh - 5 batang daun bawang - 1,5 Liter santan cair - 100 santan kental - 5 sdm kecap manis - 1 sdm gula merah - Masako Sapi secukupnya - Gula pasir Bumbu aromatik: - 2 batang serai, geprek - 3 lembar daun salam - 5 lembar daun jeruk - Sejempol lengkuas, geprek Bumbu halus: - 12 siung bawang merah - 6 siung bawang putih - 2 biji cabe merah - 3 butir kemiri - 1 ruas jahe - 1 sdm ketumbar bubuk - 1 sdt lada bubuk - 1/2 sdt jintan - 1/2 sdt kunyit bubuk Caranya: Simak di video . . . #tongseng #reseptongseng #tongsengsapi #masakanindonesia #masakanrumahan #KelezatanMasakoSapi #MasakoSapi
h: tongseng, reseptongseng, tongsengsapi, masakanindonesia, masakanrumahan, kelezatanmasakosapi, masakosapi
zh: 最爱把牛肉做成这样的东颂咖喱，卷心菜和小辣椒的嚼劲口感最享受。这道菜是家里最受欢迎的菜单，用Masako牛肉调味料来炒更香，牛骨汤味更浓郁。特制牛肉东颂咖喱，by @reystafauzia，食材：牛肉700克、卷心菜500克、番茄4个、整颗小辣椒20个、葱5根、稀椰浆1.5升、浓椰浆100克、甜酱油5汤匙、红糖1汤匙、Masako牛肉调味料适量、白糖。香料：香茅2根拍扁、月桂叶3片、青柠叶5片、南姜一块拍扁。研磨香料：红葱头12瓣、大蒜6瓣、红辣椒2个、坚果3颗、姜一段、芫荽粉1汤匙、胡椒粉1茶匙、孜然半茶匙、姜黄粉半茶匙。做法：详见视频

zh: Babarsari有一家好吃又便宜的自助烧麦，价格才1000印尼盾起。这里特别的不只是烧麦，还有用鲭鱼和梭鱼做的肉丸。花一万盾就能吃饱。可以要求炸着吃，而且他们用的是Tuban特产拉伦酱油。店名：Siomay Jawara，地址：Babarsari路，Sleman，日惹

d: Mom’s Indonesian Beef Rendang 🇲🇨   What I grew up eating for over 17 years back in my hometown, Indonesia🇲🇨😍. Today, I share this recipe with you, in honor of Indonesia's Independence Day. Happy Independence Day Indonesia, Indonesia MERDEKA! 🇮🇩✨ Ingredients A: 1.4kg of beef, topside or silverside, diced into 4cm chunks 800ml of regular coconut cream 400ml of coconut milk 1 tbsp of chicken powder 1 tbsp of Sugar 2 tsp of salt 2 tbsp of coconut sugar 6 tbsp of vegetable oil for stir fry  Ingredients B, to blend: 15 cloves of garlic  3 medium onions or 250g, chopped 30g of ginger,, cut into small pieces  30g of turmeric, cut into small pieces 6 candlenuts 30g of galangal, cut into small pieces 4 stalks lemongrass, chopped 6 tbsp of vegetable oil, to blend Ingredients C: 5 bay leaves 8 kaffir lime leaves 4 lemongrass, chopped 8 cloves wholes 3 cinnamon sticks 4 cardamoms 4 star anises Seasoning: 2 tsp of cilantro ground 2 tsp of turmeric ground 2 tsp of white pepper 2 tsp of cinnamon powder Steps: 1. Cut the beef into 4cm chunks and do not cut the beef into smaller pieces as they will break down during the cooking. 2. Add all of the Ingredients B in a blender or food processor. Then, blend it or give it a blitz until all the become a thick paste. Set aside 3. In the heavily-bottomed pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. 4. Then, pour the paste (from Ingredients B) into the pan and cook the paste until fragrant for 2 minutes. 5. Add the “Ingredients C” to the pan and stir to mix. 6. Next, add the “Seasoning” and followed by chicken powder, sugar and salt to the pan. Cook the paste until fragrant ( the paste will change color to red-brown ish ) 7. Add the beef to the pan and cook the beef until it is lightly browned.  8. Add coconut milk into the pan and stir to combine. Then, add coconut cream and bring it to simmer. 9. Cover and simmer in low heat for 1 hour until the beef is tender and the sauce thickens. (Stir it periodically to prevent the meat from burning) 10. Once the sauce has thickened and released reddish oil, add coconut sugar and give it a final mix. 11. Cover and simmer for another 30 minutes until it turns into dark brown. 12. Once it is done, enjoy with a bowl of rice! Notes: You should let the meat sit overnight for the flavors to be fully absorbed in the meat #indonesianfood #beefrendang #dinnerideas #easyrecipes

d: SAMBAL RUJAK makes me EXCITED to eat fruit!! 😍🙌🏼 —— Rujak is a traditional Indonesian Fruit/Veg Salad, served with a sauce that often combines ingredients like chilis, palm sugar, tamarind, salt, peanuts, shrimp paste.  This Sambal/Bumbu Rujak is the sweet, spicy, salty, sour, umami sauce that we dip our fruits in when we have RUJAK BUAH / RUJAK COCOL.  But there are soooo many other versions of “Rujak” in Indonesia, depending on the region it comes from.  Rujak Cingur, Rujak Bebek, Rujak Kuah Pindang etc - each using different ingredients & has a different way of being consumed! How do you guys like your fruit salad? 😝 #indonesianfood #indonesiancuisine #rujak #rujakbuah #fruitsalad #indonesia🇮🇩 #bumburujak #foodtiktok
h: indonesianfood, indonesiancuisine, rujak, rujakbuah, fruitsalad, indonesia🇮🇩, bumburujak, foodtiktok

d: One of my faaaaavorite Indonesian snacks! Bala Bala, also known as Bakwan, are Indonesian Vegetable Fritters ✨  When I’m on vacation with my aunt, she always makes these for the fam and it is 🔥 Finally managed to give her recipe a try and share it with all of you ❤️ Ingredients: 200g carrots, shredded  100 g green beans, cut  50g spring onion, cut 200g white cabbage, shredded The Batter - 550g flour  2tbsp Rice Flour 2 tbsp Maizena 2 Masako Packets (1tbsp powdered chicken stock)  White Pep 2tsp Coriander 2tsp Water 600ml 2tsp salt 6 Garlic, mashed til smooth How to Cook: 1. Mix all dry ingredients together (flours, spices, seasonings, garlic). Pour in water and whisk until smooth. That’s your batter! 2. Add your shredded veggies to your batter and give it a good mix.  3. Heat up some oil in a pan (keep it low to medium heat), drop a tablespoon of batter/veggie mix into it and that makes one fritter! Fill up your pan with a few.  4. Give it a few minutes and turn it so both sides are equally golden brown. Once the fritters have a nice golden shade, take them out of the pan and drain it on a plate lined with paper towels (just to take out some more oil). 5. Bon appétit! Total fritters - approximately 40 . . . . . . . #indonesianfood #indonesiancuisine #indonesianfoods #balabala #vegetablefritters #vegetarianrecipe #easyrecipe #snackideas #asiansnack #simplerecipe #masakanrumahan #makananindonesia #masakanindonesia #asianfoodlover #recipeshare #recipeoftheday #cookingvideo#recipevideo #foodblogger #foodlover #homecooking #homecook #veganrecipe #asianrecipe #asianfood #fyp #foryou #foryoupage #snackrecipe #snacklover #gorengan #friedfood #fypシ゚viral #bakwan #bakwansayur

d: Bismillah… save dulu siapa tau nanti butuh… Mealprep mungkin metode yg blm terlalu familiar untuk orang indonesia… umma pun baru banget nih nyobain mealprep, blm ada setahun… tp MasyaAllah , Alhamdulillah sudah terasa banget manfaatnya, apalagi buat yang punya banyak kegiatan… metode ini cocok banget untuk menghemat waktu teman2… udah gitu dalam waktu sehari bisa ganti makanan berkali - kali, ga pke ribet krn tinggal manasin, ini bisa jadi solusi buat temen2 yg bosenan…. Jgn khawatir rasanya gaenak, krn kalo disimpan dgn benar, rasa masakan tidak akan berubah… Yang paling penting dalam metode mealprep adalah, cara menyimpan & memilih bahan makanan Pilih bahan makanan yg segar, supaya kualitas dan gizinya terjamin… pastikan bahan2 yang akan kita masak dalam kondisi bersih… Setelah masakannya matang, simpan ditempat yg berkualitas dan higienis, kalo umma pake wadah kaca kusus untuk simpan bahan makanan matang… kacanya tahan panas juga jadi bisa sekalian buat manasin makanan di microwave  / dikukusan… Untuk yg berkuah umma simpan di freezer , tahan 14 hari bahkan sampe sebulan… krn kalo didalem freezer bakteri ga bisa berkembang Untuk makanan tidak berkuah, umma cukup simpan di kulkas biasa, tahan 14 hari, bahkan seperti menu teri tempe kacang kalo disimpan dikulkas bisa tahan sebulan lebih… Cobain dulu bun mealprep, siapa tau ketagihan kaya umma ☺️ Yg butuh kotak kacanya bisa komen “mau” nnt umma kirimin linknya 🤗 Semoga bermanfaat informasinya ya bun 🤍 #mealplan #foodpreparationindonesia

d: Ayam Penyet is an Indonesian dish made of fried chicken that’s been gently smashed to make it extra tender. The chicken is usually marinated with garlic, turmeric, and spices, then deep-fried until crispy.  Recipe I used: 4 chicken legs or thighs (bone-in for best flavour) 4 cloves garlic 4 shallots 3 candlenuts (or substitute 6–8 cashews) 2 cm galangal 1 tsp ground coriander ½ tsp turmeric powder 1 tsp salt 1 tsp sugar 120 ml water (½ cup) - Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, coriander, turmeric, salt, sugar, and water into a smooth paste. - ⁠Pour the paste into a wok with 2 tbsp of oil, place chicken into the paste, then fry on medium high heat for 5 minutes. Flipping every minute. Now add in enough water to cover the chicken and simmer for 35-40 minutes, flipping halfway. - ⁠remove the cooked chicken and strain the liquid - ⁠boil it till the volume reduces by half then season to taste with salt Batter: 150 ml of the leftover chicken cooking liquid 80 g rice flour 20 g corn flour ½ tsp baking powder - whisk all the ingredients together, then dip the chicken into this wet batter, coating it well - ⁠deep fry at 180°C or 360°F till golden brown, remember that the chicken is already cooked so you're just crisping up the crust - ⁠serve with rice and sambal/chilli paste Sambal recipe: 6–8 red chilies 5 bird’s eye chilies 3 garlic 3 shallots 1 tomato 1 tsp toasted belacan/shrimp paste 1 tsp sugar Salt + lime juice - dry fry all the ingredients except the sugar salt and lime  - ⁠pound the ingredients together into a rough paste then season with sugar salt and lime juice #ayampenyet #indonesianfood #friedchicken #chickenrecipe #friedchickenrecipe
zh: Ayam Penyet是印尼炸鸡料理，将炸好的鸡肉轻轻砸扁使其更嫩，通常用大蒜、姜黄和香料腌制后油炸至酥脆，附完整食谱

d: Kali ini bikin Soto Lamongan yg ga kalah sama beli di luar 😌 Udah banyak yg tau kan rahasianya pake bandeng goreng diblender tanpa kulit & tanpa duri yah. Itu yg bikin kuahnya keruh & enak. Yg paling penting pastikan air yg kalian pake itu yah. Aku pake @Air Minum Biru yg terjamin kualitasnya. Gerainya ada 740 gerai yang tersebar di Indonesia. Airnya dari sumber pegunungan yang di proses dengan 100% teknologi Ozon jadi kaya akan oksigen. Kualitasnya setara air minum kemasan tapi harganya cuma 1/3-nya, gokil kan!! d: Resep Sambal Ikan Kembung (untuk 4-5 porsi) Bahan: 200 gr ikan kembung banjar 1 sdt garam 1 sdm minyak Bahan sambal: 10 siung bawang merah 2 buah tomat merah 6 buah cabai rawit merah 15 buah cabai rawit hijau 4 gr terasi 1 sdt garam ½ sdt kaldu jamur 2 sdt gula pasir 2 sdt asam jawa 2 buah jeruk limau Bahan pelengkap: daun kemangi timun Cara membuat: 1. Sayat kedua sisi ikan kembung yang sudah dibersihkan, lalu taburi dengan garam 2. Panaskan sedikit minyak di wajan, masak ikan hingga permukaannya kecokelatan dan matang 3. Untuk membuat sambal, iris bawang merah, potong dadu tomat merah, iris cabai rawit merah dan cabai rawit hijau kemudian bakar terasi sesaat 4. Siapkan mangkuk lalu masukkan terasi bakar, bawang merah iris dan cabai rawit iris. Tambahkan garam, kaldu jamur, gula pasir, asam jawa, dan perasan jeruk limau 5. Hancurkan terasi dan asam jawa sambil diaduk rata lalu tambahkan tomat dan daging ikan kembung suwir. Aduk kembali hingga rata 6. Sambal ikan kembung siap disajikan

d: NASI HAINAN RENDAH KALORI❤️ bisa kok makan nasi rendah kalori dan ga perlu takut kalo lg diet makan nasi, ini enak banget2 masi bsa tambah sayuran, telur dsb ini harus banget di recook dan harus coba bikin nasi rendah kalori pake Low Carbo Rice Cooker dari  @Ecohome Indonesia ❤️  . Resep :  - 250 gr paha ayam  - 1 cup beras  - 3 siung bawang putih  - 1 jempol jahe iris  - 2 batang daun bawang  - 5 siung bawang putih cincang  - kecap asin  - minyak wijen  - lada garam  . Cara membuat :  - rebus 250 gr dada ayam dengan bawang putih, jahe, daun bawang, kecap asin,  minyak wijen , lada dan garam  - pisahkan ayam dan kuah rebusan  - oseng ayam sampai keluar minyak  - goreng bawang putih cincang dengan minyak ayam  - masak beras dengan kuah rebusan ayam dengan low carbo rice cooker dari Ecohome  - sajikan nasi dengan ayam dengan bawang putih goreng dan siram kuah  . SELAMAT MENCOBA

d: Easy High Protein Meal Prep Honey BBQ Chicken Mac & Cheese🍗🧀 Most Viral Recipe of 2025! 🔥 100+ million views combined across all social media platforms, this high protein honey bbq chicken mac & cheese recipe is the tastiest & easiest meal prep recipe to start your health journey in 2026 👨🏻‍🍳🫡 (Macros: Per Serving - Recipe Makes 4 Servings) 587 Calories 67.5gC | 9gF | 59gP Ingredients: 700g Diced Chicken Breast (raw weight) 1 Tsp Each of Salt, Onion Powder, Smoked Paprika & Garlic Powder 1 Tsp Olive Oil 25g Honey 85g Reduced Sugar or Sugar Free BBQ Sauce (Hughes Sugar Free BBQ Sauce) 320g Macaroni Pasta (uncooked weight) 340ml Fat Free Evaporated Milk (Carnation Light & Creamy) 80g Light Cream Cheese 1.5 Tsp Chicken Stock Powder 100g Grated Light Cheddar Cheese (Dairyworks Natural Cheddar Cheese) Instructions: 1. Start by seasoning your diced chicken breast with 1 tsp each of salt, onion powder, smoked paprika & garlic powder then add 1 tsp of olive oil & mix well. 2. Cook the chicken on medium/high heat for 4 min each side or until cooked through, once the chicken is cooked take it off the heat & add 25g of honey with 85g of bbq sauce. 3. Mix well to combine until the chicken is coated in the sauce. 4. Start cooking 320g of pasta (uncooked weight) in boiling water according to package directions. 5. While the pasta is cooking to a pan on medium heat add 340ml Fat Free Evaporated Milk, 80g light cream cheese, 1.5 tsp chicken stock powder, 100g light grated cheddar cheese & continue stirring until the sauce is fully combined & smooth/creamy. 6. Add the cooked & drained pasta to the Mac & cheese sauce then mix until the pasta is fully coated. 7. Divide the Honey BBQ Chicken and Mac & Cheese into 4 equal servings for meal prep PRO TIP: Add a splash of milk before reheating your meal prep so the mac and cheese turns out creamy every time & mix well. #macandcheese #macncheese #mealprep #highprotein #healthyrecipes

d: #มื้อที่2ของวันนี้ 14.00 น ยำหมูสับไข่เจียว+ไข่ต้ม เมนูวันนี้คงคอนเซปเดิม ทำง่ายกินง่าย อยากกินยำแต่ทำไม่เป็น จบด้วยการซื้อผงยำมาทำซะเลย เจียวไข่ 1 ฟอง(ไม่ใส่น้ำมัน) ลวกหมูบด 100 กรัม จากนั้นเอามาคลุกกับผงยำ 2 ช้อนโต๊ะ ใส่พริก หอม กับต้นหอมลงไป คลุกให้เข้ากัน 5 นาทีเสร็จ  รสชาติไม่เหมือนยำเป๊ะๆ แต่ก็อร่อยคนละแบบ กลัวไม่อิ่มเพิ่มไข่ต้มไปอีก 1 ฟอง อิ่มพอดี  ไข่ไก่ 1 ฟอง หมูสับ 100 กรัม พริกสด หอมแดง ต้มหอม ผงปรุงรสยำ 2 ชต. (10 แคล,โซเดียม 150 กรัม / 1 ช้อนโต๊ะ)  #คลีนบ้างไม่คลีนบ้าง #ห้องครัวtiktok #เมนูสุขภาพ #ปรับการกินเปลี่ยนหุ่น #ฟิตกับtiktok #รักสุขภาพ #เมนูง่ายๆ #อาหารลดน้ําหนัก #อาหารทําเอง #ยำหมูสับไข่เจียว

zh: 下午两点——碎猪肉炒蛋拌辣味沙拉+水煮蛋。今天菜单还是老套路，做起来简单吃起来方便。想吃泰式辣拌菜又不会做，直接买拌料粉来搞定。煎一个鸡蛋（不放油），烫100克猪肉末，然后加2汤匙拌料粉、辣椒、洋葱和葱拌匀，5分钟搞定。味道不是标准辣拌菜的味道，但另有一番美味。怕不饱再加了一个水煮蛋，刚好吃饱。食材：鸡蛋1个，猪肉末100克，新鲜辣椒，红葱头，葱，泰式辣拌调味粉2汤匙（每汤匙10卡路里，钠150毫克）。

d: Home Cooking Sessions: Thai Beef Salad with the most incredible lemongrass dressing. Full recipe and long-form video now up on Substack, link in bio 🇹🇭😍 - For me, there are very few salads that compare to this one, and a lot of that comes down to the dressing. It’s sharp, sweet, salty and spicy, with layers of heat, citrus and umami that somehow all work together perfectly. It’s incredibly versatile too, so once you make the dressing, you can pair it with all sorts of proteins.  I used lemongrass in both the dressing and butter baste to bring freshness and that really fragrant citrus note through the beef. The toasted rice powder is another key element here - it adds nuttiness, texture and body whilst helping absorb excess moisture so the salad stays crisp. There’s plenty of crushing, grinding and layering of flavours in this one, but if you don’t have a mortar and pestle, a food processor works perfectly well too. Full recipe, ingredients and long-form video now live on Substack, link in bio. NF x

d: แหนมสามชั้น  เปรี้ยว นัวกำลังดี ทอดกรอบๆ ทานกับน้ำพริก คือดีย์มากกก  วิธีทอดแหนมไม่ติดกระทะ คือใส่แป้งไปพร้อมน้ำมันเลยค่า กรอบ อร่อยสุดๆ ส่วนผสมและเครื่องปรุง  - หมูสามชั้นหั่นชิ้นกว้าง 2000 กรัม - ข้าวเหนียวนึ่งสุก 200 กรัม - กระเทียมสับหยาบ 200 กรัม - เกลือสมุทรป่น 3  ช้อนโต๊ะ  - พริกไทยป่น 1 ช้อนโต๊ะ  - ผงชูรส 2 ช้อนโต๊ะ - แป้งทอดกรอบ 3 ช้อนโต๊ะ  - น้ำมันสำหรับทอด 1/2 ลิตร *วางไว้อุณหภูมิห้อง 1 วัน ก็ทานได้แล้วค่ะ ใครชอบเปรี้ยวหน่อยก็ 2-3 วัน พอได้ความเปรี้ยวตามต้องการก็เก็บเข้าตู้เย็นได้เลยค่า  #แจกสูตร #แหนมทอด #สามชั้นทอด #ทำอาหาร

d: ล่ามิชลินกินของอร่อย “ร้านพริกหยวก” ประดิพัทธ์ | Prik-Yuak Pradipat รางวัล Michelin Bib Gourmand 2 ปีซ้อน 2024-2025 ร้านอาหารไทยสไตล์โฮมเมด ตำนานความอร่อยกว่า 30 ปี ได้ขยับขยายมาเปิดบ้านหลังใหม่ในย่านประดิพัทธ์ ในบรรยากาศแสนอบอุ่น (พื้นที่เก่าของโรงเรียนเรวดี)  เมนูที่ผมสั่งมาทาน •ต้มยำปลาโฉมงามน้ำใส •ผัดสตอกุ้งแชบ๊วย •ไข่พะโล้หมูฮ้อง •ตับทอดกระเทียม •ส้มตำผลไม้ คอหมูย่าง •ชุดน้ำพริกกะปิกุ้งเสียบ อาหารของท่ร้านทั้งหมด ไม่ใส่ผงชูรส น้ำมันหอย รสดี  เป็นมื้ออาหาร ที่ผมประทับใจมาก สมมงมิชลินมากๆครับ เหมาะกับพาครอบครัว พาเพื่อน พาคนพิเศษ ลูกค้า มาทานข้าวมากๆครับ แต่แนะนำว่าต้องโทรมา BOOKING กันก่อนนะครับ จอดรถในร้านได้เลยครับ #ล่ามิชลินกินของอร่อย #เทรนด์วันนี้มาแรง #MICHELINguide #MICHELIN #Bangkok

d: ซุปเห็ดเข็มทอง เมนูอีสานสุดอร่อย วัตถุดิบ เห็ดเข็มทอง	200	กรัม น้ำปลาร้า	2 ช้อนโต๊ะ น้ำ	1/3	ถ้วย กระเทียมกลีบใหญ่ปอกเปลือก	6 กลีบ หอมแดงปอกเปลือก	6 กลีบ พริกอีสาน(ตามความเผ็ดที่ชอบ) 5-10 เม็ด ผักชีฝรั่งซอย	1 ช้อนโต๊ะ ต้นหอมซอย	1 ช้อนโต๊ะ ผักชีซอย	1 ช้อนโต๊ะ วิธีทำ 1. ใส่เห็ดเข็มทอง น้ำปลาร้าและน้ำลงในหม้อ ตั้งบนไฟกลาง คั่วจนเห็ดสุก พักไว้ 2. ใส่กระเทียม หอมแดงและพริกอีสานลงในกระทะ ตั้งบนไฟกลางคั่วกระเทียม หอมแดงและพริกสุกดี ใส่ลงในครก โขลกส่วนผสมพอแหละ ใส่เห็ดเข็มทองลงไป เคล้าเบาๆ ให้เข้ากันใส่ผักชีฝรั่ง ต้นหอมและผักชีซอย คนให้พอเข้ากันอีกครั้ง จัดใส่จานเสิร์ฟ  #เมนูอีสานบ้านเฮา #เห็ดเข็มทอง #เมนูวันนี้ #tiktokห้องครัว #Kruadotco

d: 🇵🇭 Pork Adobo | Filipino Food Bible – Episode 1 My take on one of the most iconic Filipino dishes - Pork Adobo! This series will feature all filipino dishes in all their variations. consider this your guide to filipino cuisine. comment what you wanna see next! INGREDIENTS: Pork Adobo - 1.2 kg pork belly (or cut of choice) - 15–20 cloves garlic, minced (adjust to taste—more is always welcome) - 1 onion, chopped - 500 ml pork broth - 190 ml soy sauce - 100 ml cane vinegar - 3 long green chilies - 4 bay leaves - 1 tbsp whole peppercorns - 30 g palm sugar, chopped (adjust to sweetness) - Oil, for frying Toppings - Sliced onion leeks - Crispy garlic bits - Boiled eggs INSTRUCTIONS - Fry the pork until lightly browned on all sides, then remove and set aside. - In the same pot, sauté the garlic until lightly golden and fragrant. Add onions and cook until softened. - Return the pork to the pot, pour in the pork broth. Add the soy sauce, vinegar, green chilies, bay leaves, peppercorns, and palm sugar.  - Cover and let simmer on medium heat for 5-10 mins **don’t mix to allow vinegar to cook.  - Turn to low heat for 1–2 hours, until the pork is tender and the sauce has reduced. you want it to be almost swimming in its own fat like a confit - Optional: If serving with eggs, add the soft boiled eggs 2-3 mins before serving to retain jammyness - Serve over hot rice, topped with crispy garlic and leeks, and a hard-boiled egg on the side. Enjoy. #FilipinoFoodBible #filipinofood #asmr #cookingasmr #pinoyfood

d: 🇵🇭 Kare Kare | Filipino Food Bible Ep. 10 Kare-kare is a rich Filipino stew made with oxtail, tripe, and vegetables, all simmered in a thick peanut sauce. It’s usually served with bagoong (fermented shrimp paste) on the side to balance the flavors and an extra level of umami and saltiness 😋 INGREDIENTS: Boiling liquid: - 1-2 red onions, chopped - 2 bulbs of garlic, chopped - 1 tbsp of salt - 1 tbsp peppercorns - 5-6 bay leaves - 1 kg of oxtail - 650g of ox tripe - Beef stock as needed Kare Kare: - 10g of annatto powder - 2 tablespoons oil - 15-20 cloves garlic, minced - 2 tbsp annatto powder - 1 white onion, diced - 1 banana heart, chopped, washed and rinsed w/ salt - Beef stock as needed - green beans, chopped - eggplants, quartered - pechay/bok choy - 1 ½ cup peanut butter - Patis to taste - ½ teaspoon salt - 1 tbsp of sugar (optional to taste) Toasted rice slurry: - 1:5 tbsp of water to toasted rice, blended Served with:  - Bagoong  - Crushed peanuts INSTRUCTIONS:  - Start by seasoning your meat with salt and pepper and sear. Add all ingredients under “boiling liquid” and fill the pot as needed with beef stock. Simmer until tender, remove meat and set aside the broth for later.  - Saute onions, garlic, and banana hearts in oil mixed with annatto powder. Add your meat back and cover with the broth from the boiling liquid and simmer for 15-20 minutes. - To thicken the mixture, add toasted rice to a food processor or blender. Take some of the rice and mix with water to form our slurry.  - Add both rice slurry and peanut butter stir and reduce to thicken. Season with patis/salt/pepper and add your vegetables.  - Serve alongside bagoong top and enjoy!  #CookingASMR #ASMR #FilipinoFood #PinoyFood

d: 🇵🇭 Ilocos Empanada | Filipino Food Bible Episode 4 A crispy pocket of goodness filled with sausage, egg and papaya originating from Ilocos in the northern region of the Philippines. Many variations exist but this is my take inspired by both the Vigan and Batac versions! note: adjust ratios of water/flour depending on flour brand since absorption rates may vary. Measurements are weighed but adjust to your preference! INGREDIENTS: Vigan Longganisa/sausage: - 1kg ground pork - 170g of garlic, minced - 80 ml spiced cane vinegar - 80 ml soy sauce - 2-3 tsp of ground black pepper - 1 tbsp of brown sugar - Salt to taste - pinch of MSG Spiced Vinegar: - 15-20 cloves garlic - 3 green chili - 9 birds eye chili - 15 shallots - 700 ml cane vinegar - 1 tbsp freshly cracked black pepper - 1 tsp salt - 30 ml fish sauce Dough (Yield 7-8 ~110g per ball): - 340g rice flour - 2 cups water - pinch of salt - 1 1/2 tbsp of chicken powder - 2 1/2 tbsp of annatto powder - 4 tbsp oil  Filling: - 2:1 ratio shredded green papaya to mung beans - salt/pepper to taste INSTRUCTIONS:  - for spiced vinegar blend together all ingredients under "spiced vinegar”. set aside - For the sausage, combine all ingredients listed under "Vigan longganisa” mix and let sir for 1hr - overnight  . Sear until rendered and crispy. - soak beans for about 1-2 hrs. Drain and boil for ~15mins until soft. - Shred papaya, add salt. squeeze water out. Combine w/ munggo and season w salt and pepper. - For the dough combine annatto powder, oil, salt, chicken powder and water. Boil and add to flour. knead until the texture resembles clay. you can combine w/ flour directly on stovetop. - roll ball of dough between cut plastic until thin - In the center place your papaya mixture and form a small hollow circle. add sausage, and egg at the center - Fold, tuck in the sides, and cut excess dough using a plate. Fry at 165C until crispy - Serve w/ spiced vinegar and enjoy! #FilipinoFoodBible #filipinofood #asmr #cookingasmr

d: #creatorsearchinsights  📝FULL RECIPE is on my blog www.TitaBecky.com  Type "GINATAANG MANOK" in the search bar  Ginataang Manok is a dish my mom cooked a lot while growing up in the Phillipines. Bone-in chicken seasoned with salt and black pepper, cooked in garlic, ginger, onions, and coconut milk until sauce is reduced. Seasoned with fish sauce to taste. Any root and leafy vegetables can be added. I happen to have potatoes, carrots, and bell peppers. d: 🇵🇭 Arroz a la Cubana | Filipino Food Bible Episode 5 Arroz a la Cubana originated in Spain, making its way to the Philippines during the colonial period. Though it is a popular humble dish in its country of origins, there are elements that are distinctly Filipino in our version that set it apart. Namely, the use of saba, ground meat and other seasonings! 😍 INGREDIENTS: Arroz a la Cubana: - 1 whole white onion, diced - 10-15 cloves of garlic, sliced - 1 large tomato, diced - 2-3 tsp of tomato paste - 2kg of ground beef - 1/3 cup of soy sauce - 2 tbsp of Worcestershire sauce - 1 large potato, diced - 1 large carrot, diced - 1-2 bell peppers, diced - 1/2 cup of green peas - 1/2 cup of raisins - 1 tbsp of Spanish paprika - Salt and pepper to taste Others: - saba banana, sliced in half and fried - 2 eggs, sunny side up INSTRUCTIONS:  - To start sauté onions, garlic, and tomatoes until soft before adding tomato paste and mixing them together.  - Then add your ground meat, adding Worcestershire and soy sauce. Add vegetables like carrots, potatoes, bell peppers, and green peas along with raisins for added sweetness.  - Mix together, and season with paprika, salt, and pepper.  - Serve with saba, a heaping serving of your arroz a la Cubana, fried eggs and enjoy! #cookingasmr #asmr #filipinofood #pinoyfood
zh: 古巴风味炒饭｜菲律宾美食圣经第5集：古巴炒饭起源于西班牙，殖民时期传入菲律宾。菲律宾版本融入了本地特色，使用香蕉、碎肉及特色调料。附完整食材与步骤。

d: Want Pinoy food that lasts in your fridge that's NOT adobo? Try this recipe. 🔥  This version of estofado traces back to a 1935 cookbook, and the cooking process tells a story. In a time before refrigeration, it was made to last, feeding families for days. Every bite offers a glimpse into how people once cooked with care, preserving both flavor and longevity through thoughtful techniques and ingredients. 👩🏻‍🍳  ESTOFADONG FILIPINO From the book: 1935 Libro nin Pagluto asin Pagconserva Ingredients: 1 kilo of meat (usually beef or pork) 1 cup vinegar 2 onions 5 saba bananas (ripe plantains) 2 glasses of water 1 cup sugar 1 head of garlic 1 small glass (copita) of gin (Ginebra) Procedure: 1. Fry the meat until browned. Set aside the fried meat, this will be used for the stew. 2. In a separate pot or pan, caramelize the sugar by heating it with a bit of vinegar. 3. Once the sugar has melted and slightly caramelized, add the remaining vinegar and water. Stir and cook until the mixture resembles a broth. 4. While it's simmering, prepare a pot (koron) by lining the bottom with banana leaves or any barrier to prevent the meat from sticking or burning. 5. Place the fried meat into the pot, along with all the ingredients: chopped onions, garlic, sliced saba bananas, and the prepared broth. Also, add the gin at this stage. 6. Cover the meat with banana leaves to seal in moisture and flavor. 7. Cook over low heat, and once it starts boiling, reduce the fire further and let it slowly cook until the meat is tender. 8. Once done, this dish can be preserved for up to a month, and reheated only when ready to serve. #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #estofado

d: Nilagang Baka (Filipino Beef and Vegetable Soup) A cozy, comforting soup of tender beef ribs simmered in a savory broth with hearty vegetables. Best enjoyed with steamed rice and a bit of fish sauce on the side. Ingredients * 4 lbs beef ribs, cut into single pieces * 1 large onion, halved * 1 Tbsp garlic powder * 1 Tbsp black pepper * 1 Tbsp kosher salt * 2–3 beef bouillon cubes * 8 cups water * 2–3 bay leaves * 2–3 ears yellow corn, cut into thirds * 2 russet potatoes, cut into large chunks * 1 bunch bok choy, cleaned and trimmed * 2 Tbsp fish sauce (or to taste) Instructions 1. Cook the Beef: In a pressure cooker or Instant Pot, combine beef ribs, onion, garlic powder, bouillon cubes, pepper, bay leaves, and water. Pressure cook on high for 15 minutes, then let it naturally release for another 15 minutes before opening the lid. No pressure cooker? Simmer on the stovetop for 2–3 hours until ribs are fork-tender. Add water if the broth reduces too much or becomes too salty. 2. Cook the Vegetables: While the beef is cooking, boil potatoes in salted water until fork-tender (15–18 minutes). Add corn and simmer for another 5 minutes. Blanch bok choy for 1 minute and set aside. 3. Adjust the Broth: Once the beef is done, taste the broth. Adjust with more bouillon, salt, or fish sauce as needed. 4. Assemble and Serve: Add the cooked vegetables to the beef broth. Serve hot with steamed white rice and extra fish sauce on the side if desired. Enjoy! #nilagangbaka #bulalo #beefsoup #filipino #filipinofood #easyrecipe #easy #recipe #food #foodies #foodlover #dinner #lunch #dinnerideas #lunchideas
h: nilagangbaka, bulalo, beefsoup, filipino, filipinofood, EasyRecipe, easy, Recipe, food, foodies, FoodLover, dinner, lunch, DinnerIdeas, lunchideas

d: Creamy Chicken Pastel One of the most underrated and creamiest Pinoy dishes out there! Try this recipe out — it’s comforting, flavorful, and perfect for any day of the week. For this recipe, we used Star Margarine, which really brings out the aroma and flavor of the ingredients. It’s also perfect for kids, with 10 growth-building nutrients that make every bite both delicious and nutritious! INGREDIENTS: Chicken Pastel: - 250g boneless chicken thighs - Oil for frying - 1–2 scoops Star Margarine Original - 10–12 garlic cloves, minced - 1 medium onion, diced - 1 pack brown button mushrooms - 1 carrot, chopped - 1 potato, chopped - 4–6 pieces Japanese sausage (or sausage of choice) - Red and green bell peppers, sliced - 1 cup chicken broth - Fish sauce, to taste - Pepper, to taste - ⅓ cup cooking cream Star Margarine Rice: - 1 scoop Star Margarine Original - Cooked rice - Crispy garlic bits (optional) INSTRUCTIONS: - Start by searing the chicken thighs until just cooked through. Chop them into bite-sized chunks and set aside. - In the same pot, add a scoop of Star Margarine and sauté the garlic, onions, and mushrooms until fragrant and soft. - Add the vegetables and stir, then return the meat along with the bell peppers and sausage. Pour in the chicken broth, fish sauce, and cream, and stir until combined. Set aside while preparing the rice. - In a bowl, add the rice and a scoop of Star Margarine. Mix until evenly coated. - Serve the chicken pastel with the rice and top with crispy garlic bits. Enjoy! #ASMR #cookingasmr  ASC REFERENCE No. M0331P121625S
zh: 奶油鸡肉派（Creamy Chicken Pastel）：菲律宾最被低估的浓郁菜肴之一，使用Star牌人造黄油提香，附完整食材与步骤。

d: Easy Pork Salpicao Recipe | Pinoy Style Ingredients: 	•	1 kg pork kasim (cut into strips) 	•	¼ cup soy sauce 	•	¼ cup oyster sauce 	•	1 tbsp Worcestershire sauce 	•	½ tsp ground black pepper 	•	1 tsp smoked paprika 	•	Minced garlic (about 1 bulb or more) 	•	Garlic powder (optional) 	•	¼ cup butter 	•	2 bulbs garlic (for frying) 	•	2 cans whole mushrooms (halved) 	•	Coconut oil (for frying) 	•	Water as needed ⸻ Instructions: 	1.	Marinate: Combine pork, soy sauce, oyster sauce, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, smoked paprika, minced garlic, and garlic powder (optional). Marinate for at least 30 minutes or longer for better flavor. 	2.	Fry the Garlic: In a pan, heat oil and fry 2 bulbs of minced garlic until golden brown. Remove and set aside for topping. 	3.	Cook the Pork: In the same pan, add a bit of coconut oil and ¼ cup butter. Sauté the marinated pork until browned. Add a bit of water and simmer until tender. 	4.	Add Mushrooms: Stir in the halved mushrooms and the fried garlic. Simmer until the sauce reduces and oil starts to render. 	5.	Serve: Top with more fried garlic and serve hot with steamed rice #pork #recipe #salpicao #yummy #foodie

d: Chicken Salpicao | Garlicky & Saucy Filipino Style Ingredients 	•	1.7 kg chicken fillet (thigh & breast) 	•	Button mushrooms – 2 cans, halved 	•	Garlic – 3 bulbs, minced 	•	Chives, minced (for topping) 	•	Oil Marinade (marinate at least 1 hour) 	•	1/3 cup soy sauce 	•	1/2 cup oyster sauce 	•	8 tbsp Worcestershire sauce 	•	2 tbsp paprika 	•	2 tsp ground pepper 	•	3–4 tbsp garlic powder Procedure 	1.	Marinate chicken for at least 1 hour. 	2.	Pan-sear marinated chicken for 5 minutes until lightly browned. Remove from pan, let cool, then slice into bite-sized pieces. 	3.	In the same pan, fry minced garlic in oil until golden brown. Set aside. 	4.	Using the same pan, add: 	•	oil used for frying garlic 	•	sliced chicken 	•	leftover marinade 	•	chicken drippings 	•	about 1/4 cup water 	5.	Cover and simmer. 	6.	Halfway through cooking, add: 	•	halved button mushrooms 	•	half of the fried garlic 	7.	Continue simmering until sauce thickens and oil is rendered. 	8.	Adjust taste if needed. 	9.	Top with remaining fried garlic and minced chives. 	10.	Serve hot with rice #salpicao #chicken #recipe #yummy #foodie

d: Spring Comfort Food Series Part 14: Buffalo Chicken Bacon Ranch Mac & Cheese Recipe👇: All 4 Full RECIPES will be uploaded to my RECIPE VAULT on my Substack (link in bio) Recipe: Bacon Mac and Cheese Ingredients * 1 box corkscrew pasta, cooked al dente * 1/2 lb bacon, chopped * 3 tbsp flour * 1 packet Hidden Valley Ranch seasoning * Paprika, to taste * 1 can evaporated milk * 2 cups whole milk * 1/2 cup heavy cream * 1 tbsp hot sauce * 1 tbsp mustard * 1 cup shredded Gouda * 1 cup shredded mozzarella * 1 cup shredded Colby Jack * 1 cup shredded cheddar * Extra shredded cheese for layering and topping * Salt and pepper, to taste * Buffalo chicken, for serving * Ranch, for drizzling Instructions 1. Chop the bacon, add it to a large pot, and cook until crispy. Remove the bacon and set aside, leaving the bacon grease in the pot. 2. Add the ranch seasoning and paprika to the bacon grease and toast for about 30 seconds. 3. Stir in the flour and cook for 1 to 2 minutes to make a roux. 4. Slowly pour in the evaporated milk, whole milk, and heavy cream while stirring. 5. Add the hot sauce and mustard, then let the sauce thicken. 6. Turn the heat to low and mix in the Gouda, mozzarella, Colby Jack, and cheddar until smooth. 7. Season with salt and pepper, then fold in the cooked pasta and some of the crispy bacon. 8. Add half the mac and cheese to a baking dish, layer with extra shredded cheese, then add the rest of the mac and cheese on top. 9. Top with more cheddar and paprika. 10. Bake at 325°F for 20 to 25 minutes, then broil for about 5 minutes until golden and crispy on top. 11. Scoop the mac and cheese into a bowl, top with buffalo chicken, crispy bacon pieces, and a drizzle of ranch. #chicken #ranch #macandcheese #dinner #recipe
