d: Crispy Sweetcorn Chipotle Chicken Salad 🌽🥗  Trust me when I say this crispy sweetcorn chipotle chicken salad is about to become your new obsession!! 😍 It’s crunchy, fresh, smoky, packed with flavour and makes the perfect high protein meal prep for the week. Save for later☝🏼 •452 kcals (not including tortilla chips) •44g PRO, 25g CHO, 18g FAT Serves 1: -100g of uncooked chicken breast -1 tsp of paprika -1/2 tsp of garlic granules -Oil spray -80g of drained sweetcorn -Salt/pepper -1/4 of a large cucumber, finely diced -1/2-1 red onion, finely diced -Handful of fresh parsley and/or coriander, chopped  -30g of feta cheese, crumbled  -2 tbsp of grated parmesan  -Tortilla chips, to serve (optional & not included in calories) Dressing: -100g of 0% Greek yoghurt -1 tsp of olive oil -1 tsp of chipotle paste -Squeeze of lemon juice -Salt/pepper Method: 1. Season chicken with paprika and garlic granules. Spray with oil and air fry or cook in the oven at 180°C for 15-20 minutes. Chop into chunks once cooked and cooled.  2. Place corn in a lined air fryer, season with salt and pepper. Spray with oil and air fry at 180°C for 15-20 minutes until charred and crispy.  3. Remove seeds from the cucumber and finely dice along with red onion and parsley.  4. For the dressing, mix all the ingredients together. 5. Add the cucumber, red onion, chicken, parsley, half of the feta cheese, 1 tbsp of parmesan, half of the crispy corn and the dressing. Toss together. 6. Serve in a bowl, top with the remaining feta, corn and 1 tbsp of parmesan. Enjoy on it’s own or with some tortilla chips on the side. Enjoy! #crispysweetcorn #highproteinmeals #mealprepideas #healthyrecipes #easylunchideas

d: ✨Cheesy chicken fajita slider buns 🍔 ingredients: * Chicken: 500 g (cut into cubes) * Oil: 1/3 cup * Ginger garlic paste: 1 tbsp * Capsicum: 1/2 (chopped) * White onion: 1 (chopped) * Tomato paste: 1 tbsp * Cream cheese: 1 tbsp * Ketchup: 4–5 tbsp * Sweet chilli sauce: 4–5 tbsp Spices: * paprika powder: 1 tsp * Salt: 1 tsp * Achar gosht masala: 1 tsp * Coriander powder: 1/2 tsp * Cumin powder: 1/2 tsp * Dried parsley: 1/2 tsp * Oregano: 1/2 tsp * Red chilli flakes: 1/2 tsp For Assembly: * Slider buns: 6 * Mozzarella cheese slices * Mozzarella cheese (grated) * Spring onion (chopped) Burger Sauce: * Mayonnaise: 4–5 tbsp * Ketchup: 1 tbsp * Hot sauce: 1 tsp * Mustard sauce: 1 tbsp * Sweet chilli sauce: 2 tbsp * Cayenne powder: 1/2 tsp * Salt: a pinch * Dried parsley: 1/2 tsp * Mix everything well For the Butter Coating: * Melted butter: 5–6 tbsp * Paprika powder: 1/2 tsp * Fresh parsley: 1 tbsp (chopped) * Garlic: 2–3 cloves (minced) Instructions: * Heat oil in a pan. * Add chicken, ginger garlic paste, and all the spices. Cook until the chicken is done. * Add onion and capsicum and cook for 2–3 minutes. * Add tomato paste, cream cheese, ketchup, and sweet chilli sauce. * Mix well and cook for another 2 minutes on medium heat. * Place slider buns in an oven-safe dish. * Add mozzarella slices, chicken filling, burger sauce, spring onion, and grated mozzarella cheese. Close the buns. * Brush the tops with melted butter mixed with parsley, paprika, and minced garlic. * Bake at 160°C for 7–8 minutes, or until the cheese melts. No idea what to cook… Kitchy saves me every time.✨@kITCHY  #quickrecipes #DinnerIdeas #fyp #quickmeals #burger

d: Solid 9.2 out of 10 this one. Creamy. Garlicky. Crispy. And ridiculously easy to make. 10 out of 10 if you dip it in sweet chilli jam though. That combo was FILTHY. Creamy Garlic Chicken Wraps 🌯 ✅ Ingredients 500g chicken breast   4 medium wraps   80g low fat mozzarella   120g low fat cream cheese   20g parmesan   60g spinach   3 garlic cloves   80ml semi skimmed milk   1 tsp paprika   1 tsp garlic powder   1 tsp onion powder   1 tsp oregano   Salt and black pepper   Spray oil   ✅ Method 1. Chop chicken breast into chunks. 2. Add paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, oregano, salt and pepper. 3. Mixy mixy. 4. Fry chicken in a pan for around 6 to 8 minutes until cooked through. 5. Add grated garlic and cook for 30 seconds. 6. Add low fat cream cheese and stir while it melts. 7. Add milk and mix until smooth. 8. Add parmesan and spinach. 9. Cook until the spinach wilts. 10. Add mozzarella to the middle of your wraps. 11. Add the creamy chicken filling. 12. Wrap tightly. 13. Spray with oil and sprinkle oregano on top. 14. Air fry at 200°C for 6 to 8 minutes until golden and crispy. ✅ Macros per wrap Calories: ~430   Protein: ~40g   Carbs: ~27g   Fat: ~14g   Fibre: ~3g   Cheers boy: @Meals with Max

d: They always ask why I didn’t make more | full recipe ⬇️ Smoked to perfection with @harmosgrill flavored pellets Serves: 6–8  Total Time: ~2–3 hours (including marinade) Ingredients Chicken 3–4 lbs bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (non-negotiable) 3–4 tbsp spicy brown mustard 2 tbsp Cuso’s Hot Honey Seasoning 2 tbsp Cuso’s Roasted Garlic & Onion Seasoning Grill / Smoke Harmos wood pellets: Spanish Barbecue Pirate & Turkish Barbecue Traveler Jalapeño Green Sauce 2–3 jalapeños (adjust for heat) 1 cup fresh cilantro 2–3 garlic cloves ½ cup Greek yogurt 2–3 tbsp olive oil Salt, to taste Black pepper, to taste Instructions 1. Marinate the Chicken Add chicken thighs to a large bowl. Coat fully with spicy brown mustard. Season generously with Cuso’s Hot Honey + Roasted Garlic & Onion seasoning. Mix until evenly coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least a few hours (overnight preferred). 2. Preheat the Grill Preheat your pellet grill to 350°F. Load with Harmos pellets (Spanish Barbecue Pirate + Turkish Barbecue Traveler) for deep smoky flavor with paprika, garlic, rosemary, and spice notes. 3. Make the Jalapeño Green Sauce Add jalapeños, cilantro, garlic, Greek yogurt, olive oil, salt, and pepper to a blender. Blend until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning or heat. Chill until ready to serve. 4. Smoke the Chicken Place chicken directly on the grill grates. Cook for about 1 hour, until internal temp reaches 160°F. 5. Crank the Heat Increase grill temp to 500°F. Cook until chicken hits 180°F internal and skin gets crispy with great color. 6. Serve Remove from grill and rest a few minutes. Serve with the jalapeño green sauce on the side or drizzled over top. #HarmosGrill  #HarmosWoodPellets  #HarmosFlavoredPellets

d: MARRY ME MASH 🥔✨ Recipe below ⬇️ This is the ultimate recipe for luxurious mashed potato. Ultra-smooth, buttery, garlic-thyme infused, finished with white pepper and nutmeg. Make no mistake - this is pure indulgence, and it will make your guests so silent at the table. Marry Me Mash: Peel and cube 1kg Maris Piper potatoes. Add to cold salted water, bring to the boil, then simmer gently until completely tender. Drain and leave to steam dry for 20-30 minutes (this step is key for texture). Meanwhile, gently simmer 200ml whole milk and 200ml double cream with 4 chopped garlic cloves and 3-4 thyme sprigs for 30 minutes to infuse. Strain and keep warm. Pass the dried potatoes through a ricer, then fold through 150g melted butter. For extra smoothness, push through a fine mesh sieve. Add the warm infused cream one ladle at a time until silky and smooth but still holding its shape. Season with fine salt, white pepper and a small grating of nutmeg. Taste and adjust. Bonus recipe - Braised Short Rib (perfect with this mash): Season 3-4 large beef short ribs generously with salt and pepper and sear in a hot casserole pot with 1 tbsp oil until deeply browned. Remove. In the same pot soften 1 diced onion, 2 diced celery sticks and 2 diced carrots. Add 2 tbsp tomato purée, 3 sliced garlic cloves, 3 thyme sprigs and 2 bay leaves. Deglaze with 500ml red wine, reduce slightly, then add enough beef stock (around 750ml-1L) to fully submerge the ribs. Return the ribs, cover and cook at 130°C for 4 hours until spoon tender. Remove the ribs, strain and remove the fat from the sauce (use a separator jug if you have one). Pass through a fine sieve and then reduce it until glossy and thick enough to coat the back of a spoon. Return the ribs to the sauce and baste. Silky mash. Sticky, rich beef. Absolute comfort food - elevated. #mash #shortrib #cooking #recipe #food

d: Home Cooking Sessions: Rigatoni Bolognese. An Italian classic, my way. Full recipe now up on Substack, link in bio 🇮🇹🫶🏼 - Knowing how to make a proper bolognese is something every home cook should have under their belt. This meat sauce is one of the most comforting and satisfying things you can make, yet despite the depth of flavour it delivers, the process itself is incredibly simple. Whenever I make this, I make a very large batch. Not only does it freeze exceptionally well, but it genuinely tastes even better the next day. Having portions of homemade ragù sitting in the freezer means restaurant-quality pasta is never more than 20 minutes away.  Every week I break down the full method and process of all these recipes on Substack - longform cooking video included - link in bio. NF x

d: Raising Cane’s at Home 🐔🏠 For ALL of you asking - the app link for Osta is in my bio or you can search “Osta Recipes” on the App Store or Google Play store ‼️🫶 Crispy buttermilk chicken tenders, addictive Cane’s sauce and fluffy texas toast… all at home!  For the Chicken: -2 lbs (0.9 kg) chicken breast, sliced into strips (or use tenderloins) -2 cups buttermilk -1/3 cup pickle juice -Seasonings: 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp onion powder, 1 tsp salt, 1 tsp black pepper -Neutral oil, for frying Flour Mixture: -2 cups all-purpose flour +1/2 cup cornstarch -1 tsp baking powder -Seasonings: 2 tsp garlic powder, 2 tsp paprika, 2 tsp salt, 2 tsp black pepper Cane’s Sauce -1/2 cup mayonnaise -1/4 cup ketchup -2 tsp Worcestershire sauce -Seasonings: 1 tsp garlic powder, 1 tsp onion powder, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp black pepper, 1 tsp seasoning salt Instructions: 1. Slice the chicken breasts into strips about 1 inch thick and 3–4 inches long (roughly tender-sized). In a bowl, whisk together the buttermilk, pickle juice, and chicken seasonings until fully combined. Add the chicken and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or overnight for extra tender chicken. 2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and flour mixture seasonings. Mix. 3. Add neutral oil to a large pot or deep skillet until it is about 2–3 inches deep. Heat the oil to 350°F / 175°C.  Keeping the oil around this temperature ensures crispy chicken without burning the coating. 4. Drizzle a little buttermilk marinade into the flour mixture and stir to create flaky, crispy bits. Shake excess marinade off the chicken, then coat each piece thoroughly in the flour mixture. Shake off any extra flour and gently place into the hot oil. 5. Don’t touch them for the first 1–2 mins, that’s how you get the perfect crust. Fry for 7–10 mins, or until golden brown and cooked through. Transfer the chicken to a paper towel-lined rack to drain. 6. In a bowl, combine all the sauce ingredients then refrigerate.  7. Serve the chicken with a side of sauce, texas toast & crinkle fries… Enjoy :) #dinner #raisingcanes #chicken #tiktokrecipe #recipesoftiktok #dinneridea #homecooking
h: dinner, raisingcanes, chicken, tiktokrecipe, recipesoftiktok, dinneridea, homecooking
zh: 在家复刻Raising Cane's炸鸡。酥脆酪乳鸡柳、令人上瘾的Cane's酱和松软德州烤吐司，全部在家搞定！食材：鸡肉：900g鸡胸肉切条、2杯酪乳、1/3杯泡菜汁、调料（蒜粉、红椒粉、洋葱粉、盐、黑胡椒各1茶匙）、炸油。面粉混合料：2杯中筋面粉+1/2杯玉米淀粉、1茶匙泡打粉、调料（蒜粉、红椒粉、盐、黑胡椒各2茶匙）。Cane's酱：蛋黄酱1/2杯、番茄酱1/4杯、伍斯特酱2茶匙、调料（蒜粉、洋葱粉、红椒粉、黑胡椒、调味盐各1茶匙）。步骤：1.鸡胸肉切条，与酪乳、泡菜汁及调料混合腌制至少2小时或过夜。2.混合面粉、淀粉、泡打粉及调料备用。3.锅中倒油约5-7cm深，加热至175°C。4.将少许腌料淋入面粉中拌出碎片，鸡肉甩去多余腌料后裹粉，轻放入油锅。5.前1-2分钟不要翻动，炸7-10分钟至金黄熟透，捞出沥油。6.混合酱料冷藏备用。7.搭配酱料、德州烤吐司和波纹薯条享用。

d: My name is Justin, I’m glad you’re here Steak Stir Fry -2 Strip Steaks cut into bite sized pieces -4 eggs -4 cups day old rice -1 bag frozen stir fry mix veggies -Teriyaki sauce too taste -Garlic and butter seasoning to taste -2 tsp’s MSG -1 tbsp sesame oil -3 tbsps high heat cooking oil -(optional)sesame seeds, Japanese bbq sauce, yum yum sauce to garnish Preheat oil in wok at medium high heat Season steak with garlic butter seasoning using teriyaki sauce as a binder Heat frozen veggies to almost done in microwave or in steamer and set aside Add steak to pan and cook til almost done Remove from pan and add eggs Scramble til cooked making sure to keep eggs moving so not to burn Add rice mixing constantly so not to burn eggs in pan Add sesame oil, teriyaki sauce, msg and additional garlic butter seasoning if desired (I usually add 1 tbsp of teriyaki mix for a minute and add more til desired color on rice is achieved) Return steak to pan, turn off heat and stir til mixed Serve hot, optional garnish with green onion, sesame seeds, yum yum sauce, hot honey, Japanese bbq sauce, or whatever you love to eat your stir fry with  #steakfriedrice #griddle #dinner #mealideas #holmescooking

At this point we ALL need to work together to lower costs for Georgians ! #ossof #healthyrecipes #cajunchicken #onepot #foodie Cajun Chicken & Rice  Ingredients: Chicken marinated:  2 Lbs Bonless skinless chicken thighs  1/2 Tbsp Sazon tropical  1/2 Tbsp Smoked paprika  1/2 Tbsp ( low sodium) cajun seasoning  2 Tbsp Olive oil  Other ingredients  1 tbsp Olive oil  1 tbsp butter  1/2 red or yellow onion diced  2 Tbsp Minced garlic  2 cup cooked white rice  Cream Sauce  2 Tbsp Butter  1/2 a lemons juice  1 Tbsp Garlic powder  2 Tsp Tablespoons cajan seasoning  1/2 tbsp Smoked paprika  1 cup Heavy cream  Instructions: 1. Start by marinating your thighs with the chicken marinade above! (allow to marinate for thirty minutes to twenty four hours in the refrigerator) 2. After the chicken is marinated melt down butter in a pan along with olive oil,  3. Once  your butter begins to bubble add in your chicken and cook on each side for 5 to 7 minutes on medium heat for a total of 10 to 14 minutes or until internal temperature of 165° F 4.  Next remove your chicken from the pan 5. In clean pan melt down your butter add in your diced onions, minced garlic, and a pinch of Cajun seasoning & sauté for 60 seconds on medium heat  6. Once your garlic and onions become fragrant, add in cooked rice and mix until all your rice is well coated with seasoning and remove from heat Cream sauce  1. For your cream sauce in a medium sauce pan, meltdown,your butter over medium to low heat, and adding all your ingredients for your cream sauce whisk and stir continuously until your sauce thickens, and is able to coat the back of your spoon 2. Add to chicken back into your rice and top with your cream sauce and enjoy!!

5-minute bulgogi that doesn’t need to be pre-marinated! if you’re new here, welcome back to lazy girl dinners where i make easy asian-inspired meals the whole family loves. lazy girl dinners, ep 4: 5-minute bulgogi 🥩 what you need: 1.5-2 lbs thinly sliced beef brisket (or ground beef!) 1 onion, sliced ⅓ cup soy sauce 2 tbsp mirin 2 tbsp sugar (i used applesauce!) 1 tbsp sesame oil 1 tsp dashi powder how to make it: slice onion and sauté until fragrant add in thinly sliced beef mix sauce ingredients together and pour over beef close lid and let cook for 3 minutes or until fully cooked through garnish with sesame seeds and green onions serve over rice #lazygirldinners #familymeals #easymeal #easyrecipe #quickrecipes

These brownies prove that sometimes the best meals are found in school cafeteria. 👀🍫 Keep reading or tap the link in the @allrecipes bio for full recipe details. ⤵️ Ingredients: Cooking spray 1 cup butter, melted 1/2 cup cocoa powder 1/4 teaspoon kosher salt 2 cups sugar 2 cups flour 4 large eggs, beaten 1 tablespoon vanilla extract 🧡 Frosting 1/4 cup butter, softened 1/4 cup cocoa powder 2 teaspoons vanilla extract 3 tablespoons milk 2 1/2 cups powdered sugar Directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Line a 9 x 13 rimmed baking sheet or pan with parchment paper and lightly grease with cooking spray. Stir together butter and cocoa powder in a large bowl until well combined. Add sugar and salt and mix well. Stir in flour. Mix in eggs and vanilla until well blended. Pour mixture into prepared baking sheet and bake until just done, 18 to 21 minutes. Meanwhile whisk together butter, cocoa powder, vanilla, and milk in a bowl. Gradually add in powdered sugar and whisk until thick and creamy. Let brownies cool for 10 minutes and spread frosting over brownies while they are still warm. Let cool completely before cutting into squares and serving. 🎥: Nicole @nicolesperfectbite #brownies #dessert #baking #cafeteria

d: so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights
zh: 我们终于可以在家做爆款点点蛋糕了，这是我最新喜欢的小甜点。配料：1盒彩虹蛋糕粉、3个鸡蛋、1杯水、半杯油、彩虹香草糖霜、彩色糖珠。做法：混合蛋糕粉、鸡蛋、水和油，倒入方形烤盘，350°烤35至40分钟中途盖锡纸，冷却后用涂油的烤碗压出小蛋糕，从中间切开分两层，夹入糖霜，表面裹满彩色糖珠，放冰箱冷藏变硬后从中心咬开享用。

d: SAVE this recipe for your next meal! It’s just like Papa Tea’s stir fried crab but with shrimp and shrimp paste 😋 ➡️ Recipe: Stir fried shrimp 🦐  2 lbs shrimp, head-on, trimmed and deveined  1/3 cup cornstarch  1/3 cup cooking oil 1 medium onion  1-2 jalapeños  3 stalks green onions 1 inch piece ginger  4-5 cloves garlic  2 tbsp butter  3 tbsp oyster sauce  1 1/2 tbsp crab paste in soy bean oil  1/2 tbsp fish sauce  2 tsp sugar 2 tbsp chicken boullion  1/4 tsp black pepper  Trim the horns, antennae, and front legs from the shrimp using kitchen shears. Devein, then rinse and pat dry thoroughly. Coat the shrimp with cornstarch, tossing until evenly coated. Heat 1/3 cup of cooking oil in a large pan or wok over medium-high heat. Working in small batches, arrange the shrimp in a single layer and cook for 1–2 minutes per side, until lightly golden and crispy. Remove and set aside. Discard all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the wok, leaving the browned bits and drippings behind. Add the butter and let it melt. Sauté the onions, garlic, and ginger for about 2 minutes, until the onions are just translucent. Add the oyster sauce, fish sauce, sugar, chicken bouillon, and black pepper. Stir well until the seasonings are fully dissolved and combined, about 1 minute. Add the sliced jalapeños and toss for 30 seconds. Return the shrimp to the wok and toss until evenly coated in the sauce. Add the green onions and give everything one final toss. Serve with steamed white rice and enjoy! #shrimp #easyrecipe #recipes #foodtiktok #cooking

d: In-N-Out at Home Pt 3 - Animal Style Fries 🍟 Part 4 dropping SOON 😎 can you guess what it is?  In-N-Out’s fries suck, so we’re making them better at home. Load them up with American cheese, caramelized onions, and the upgraded In-N-Out spread from episode 2. Optionally serve these with the Animal Style Double Double (episode 1) and you’ve got the full In-N-Out meal better at home 🍔🍟 👉 Full detailed recipes in bio 🔗 — Caramelized Onions 2 diced yellow onions, butter or oil, pinch of sugar, pinch of salt. Cook on medium-low for 25–30 min until deep golden-brown and jammy. In-N-Out SECRET Sauce (upgraded)  Mayo, ketchup, diced dill pickles, pickle juice, sugar, paprika, grated garlic, MSG, chopped chives, caramelized onions. Mix until combined and chill in the fridge. FULL RECIPE IN EPISODE 2 🔥 Fries Carefully fry frozen French fries (from frozen - patted lightly with paper towels) at 350°F until CWISPY → drain on a wire rack → season with salt. Build (Animal Style) Hot fries → top with American cheese → broil cheese until melted → add caramelized onions → drizzle In-N-Out sauce. Enjoy friends :)  — #AnimalStyleFries #InNOut #CopycatRecipe #FastFoodAtHome #AnimalStyle

Breakfast for husband day 49 - Soy-Glazed Eggplant Rice Bowl, Crispy Roasted Potato & Egg Salad 1. Pressure Cooker Rice Cooking - 2 cups of rice, 2 cups of water - 5-6 potatoes - 4 eggs - 3 eggplants - 1 zucchini 2. Eggplant Rice Bowl - Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise, fry both sides in an oiled frying pan until golden brown, then set aside for a moment. - Add 2T soy sauce, 2T cooking wine, and 2T agave syrup to the pan, and when it lightly simmers, add the fried eggplants and braise them down. - Place on top of the rice, and finish by sprinkling green onions and sesame oil. 3. Zucchini Salad - Cut the zucchini into bite-sized pieces (slice thickly for a better texture). - Add a little 0.5T Tsuyu, 1T perilla oil, and whole perilla seeds, then mix. 4. Potato Egg Salad - Smash the steamed potatoes flat, sprinkle with olive oil and salt, and air fry at 180°C for 15 minutes. - Make the sauce by adding 100g Greek yogurt, 2T mayonnaise, 2T whole grain mustard, 2T lemon juice, 2T agave syrup, and salt. - Add the boiled eggs and roasted potatoes into the sauce and mix. 1. 압력밥솥 밥취사 - 쌀 2컵, 물 2컵 - 감자 5-6개 - 계란 4개 - 가지 3개 - 애호박 1개 2. 가지덮밥 - 가지는 반갈라서 기름 두른 후라이팬에 양면을 노릇하게 구워준 후 잠시 덜어둔다 - 팬에 간장 2T, 맛술 2T, 아가베시럽2T를 넣고 살짝 끓어오르면 구워둔 가지를 넣고 졸여준다 - 밥위에 얹어 주고, 쪽파, 참기름을 뿌려 마무리한다 3. 애호박무침 - 애호박은 먹기 좋게 썰어서(두툼하게 썰어야 식감이 좋음) 준다 - 쯔유 약간0.5T, 들기름1T, 통들깨를 넣고 섞어준다 4. 감자계란샐러드 - 찐감자는 납작하게 눌러 올리브오일, 소금을 뿌려 에어프라이어에서 180도로 15분간 구워준다 - 그릭요거트 100g, 마요네즈 2T, 홀그레인머스타드 2T, 레몬즙2T, 아가베시럽 2T, 소금을 넣고 소스를 만들어준다 - 소스에 삶은 계란, 구운감자를 넣고 섞어준다  #breakfast #cookinghack #ricecooker #healthyfood #fyp

Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, chili oil, minced garlic, and green onions on top of the cheese. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. Enjoy hot and creamy  #buldak #buldakramen #eat #food  #foodie

Lemon Garlic Salmon Pasta 🍋🧄 definitely a MUST try!! Full Recipe Below ✨ Lemon Garlic Salmon Pasta Ingredients For the Salmon * 4 salmon fillets * 1 teaspoon Kinders Lemon Garlic Butter seasoning * 1 teaspoon garlic powder * 1 teaspoon of onion powder  * 1 teaspoon oregano * 1 teaspoon paprika * 1 tablespoon butter * 1 tablespoon oil For the Pasta * noodles of your choice For the Cream Sauce * 1½ cups heavy whipping cream * ¼ cup fresh lemon juice * ¼ cup reserved pasta water * Zest of 1 lemon * 3 tablespoons butter * 6 garlic cloves, minced (or more) * 1 shallots, finely chopped (optional) * 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese * 1 teaspoon garlic powder or Kinders garlic and herb seasoning * 1 teaspoon of onion powder  * 1 teaspoon Kinders Lemon Garlic Butter seasoning * 1 teaspoon oregano * 1–1½ teaspoons red chili flakes * Salt and black pepper, to taste Optional Garnish * Fresh parsley * Extra Parmesan cheese * Lemon wedges Instructions 1. Cook the Pasta Bring a large pot of generously salted water to a boil. Cook the fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve ¼ cup of pasta water, then drain and set aside. 2. Season the Salmon  Pat the salmon fillets dry with paper towels. Rub lightly with oil, then season both sides with Kinders Lemon Garlic Butter seasoning, garlic powder, oregano, onion powder, and paprika. 3. Cook the Salmon Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the oil and butter. Once hot, sear the salmon for 3–4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through. Spoon the pan drippings over the salmon as it cooks for extra flavor. Remove from the skillet and set aside. 4. Sauté the Aromatics Reduce the heat to medium. In the same skillet, melt the butter. Add the chopped shallots and sauté for about 3 minutes until softened. Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1–2 minutes, until fragrant. 5. Make the Sauce Pour in the lemon juice and heavy cream, stirring to combine. Let simmer for 2–3 minutes until slightly thickened. Stir in the lemon zest. 6. Season the Sauce Add the garlic powder, (@Kinder's Flavors Carlic and Herb) Kinders Lemon Garlic Butter seasoning, oregano, red chili flakes, Parmesan cheese, salt, and black pepper. Stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth. Add the reserved pasta water and mix until fully combined. 7. Combine the Pasta Add the cooked fettuccine to the skillet and toss until evenly coated in the creamy sauce. Let cook for another 1–2 minutes so the pasta absorbs the flavor. 8. Serve Plate the pasta and top with the salmon fillets, or serve alongside. Garnish with fresh parsley, extra Parmesan, red pepper flakes and lemon wedges if desired. #salmon #pastatiktok #salmonrecipe #dinnerideas #recipesoftiktok

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

For 8 yuan ($1 USD) in China, I got a full kilogram of Jiang Xiang Bing  (酱香饼). The dough is flattened so wide that it folds onto itself while  baking, creating layers of texture. After five minutes in the oven, a  sweet fermented wheat sauce is brushed over the top. The folds soak up  the sauce, locking in extra flavor. Sesame seeds and scallions are  sprinkled as the finishing touch. The result is a fluffy, chewy bread  with a perfect balance of sweet and savory.   #China #Food #Travel #ChineseFood #ChinaFood #StreetFood

Bet you’ve NEVER seen cheese like that before! 🧀 🇨🇳  a d   📍 Kunming, Yunnan Provence     The food in Yunnan is unlike anywhere else in China. Being situated so close to South East Asian, the food is predominantly rice-based and also tends to be a little lighter and fresher. It’s also one of the only places in China where cheese is actually eaten!    9 STREET FOODS TO TRY IN KUNMING:    * Steamed Flower Rolls (hua juan 花卷) 🥟   * Grilled Rice Cake (shao erkuai 烧饵块) 🫓  * Baked Rice Cake (kao erkuai 烤饵块) 🍰  * Milk Fan with Rose Jam (rushan 乳扇) 🌹   * Fried Tofu (zhà dòufu 炸豆腐) 🧈  * Fried Potato (zhá mǎlíngshǔ 炸馬鈴薯) 🥔  * Grilled Octopus (kǎo yóuyú 烤鱿鱼) 🐙   * Firm Goat’s Cheese (ru bing 乳饼) 🐐   * Stir-Fried Rice Noodles (chǎo mǐfěn 炒米粉) 🍜     @China Now #NihaoChina #Tripcom #Travelwithtripcom #NihaoYunnan #NihaoKunming

Street food ramen in China hits different. For just 20 yuan ($3 USD), I got a cup that looks exactly like the packaging but way better. No flavoring packets here. The vendor adds her own seasoning, chili oil, a big spoonful of tender beef, rich braising liquid, and tops it off with beef broth. The soup is deep and savory with zero artificial aftertaste. The noodles are perfectly chewy, and the beef melts in your mouth.  #China #food #chinafood #ChineseFood #StreetFood #ChineseBreakfast #BreakfastInChina #beef #beefnoodles #noodles #GuangxiFood #TraditionalFood #ComfortFood #LocalEats #CheapEats #BudgetEats #Foodie #StreetFoodChina #AuthenticFood #AsiaFood #SoupLover #MorningEats #FoodShorts #FoodVlog #DailyLifeChina #HiddenGems #ViralFood #StreetEats #FoodAdventure #ChinaEats #Travel #ChineseStreetFood #FoodReview #AsianFood #nightmaket #RegionalChineseFood #BrothLover #Eat #StreetVendor #HotSoup #FlavorfulEats #ChineseCuisine #NoodleSoup #TravelChina #CulturalEats #FoodieFinds #mukbang #tiktok

A $2 buffet in Chengdu China serves more than 20 dishes including oyster  mushrooms, fried fish, stir-fries and vegetables. It has become a  favorite spot for workers and delivery riders looking for a filling meal  at the lowest price. Children under 4 and seniors over 85 eat for free.  The taste is simple, but the unbeatable value keeps the restaurant  packed every day.   #China #Food #Travel #ChinaFood #ChineseFood #Buffet #StreetFood #CheapEats #Foodie #FoodShorts #LocalEats #FoodReview #ViralFood #AsianFood #DailyLifeChina #HiddenGems #SichuanFood #ChineseCuisine #BudgetMeals #FoodVlog #SoloTravel #UniqueDining #FoodAdventure #Cheap #Delicious #Clean #rice

d: @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur doing a @71cent dance to Cradles by Sub Urban is pure brainrot meme energy in the best way. It takes the instantly recognizable Tung Tung Tung Sahur character, adds a viral dance feel, and pairs it with the dark dreamy vibe of Cradles to create a chaotic edit that feels made to stop the scroll. What makes this work is the contrast. Tung Tung Tung Sahur already has that loud, weird, unforgettable meme presence, and putting that energy into a clean dance to Cradles makes the whole thing feel even more absurd and replayable. It has that perfect mix of creepy-cute, chaotic, and weirdly smooth energy that makes people watch again just because it should not go this hard. Use this CapCut template for green screen jokes, reaction memes, brainrot edits, or any post where you want a recognizable meme character to instantly bring chaos to the screen. It works especially well for dance remixes, cursed character edits, and “why is this actually fire” posts that feel random in exactly the right way. d: A legendary jump scare 😭 The red demon jump scare from the 2010 horror movie Insidious is widely considered one of the most effective and iconic jump scares in modern cinema history. d: You HAVE to try this quick and easy karaage from Campfire Cooking in Another World With My Absurd Skill! 🪵 Let me know your comfort anime in the comments! Recipe - deboned skin on chicken thighs  - 1 cup soy sauce - 1 tbsp ginger garlic paste - 1/2 cup sake - he didn’t do this but I would add 1/2 cup mirin too - seasoned flour  First take some kitchen sheers and cut the bone out of the skin on chicken thigh. Cut into bite sized pieces. Add to ziploc bag along with the marinade ingredients above. Let marinate for 30 minutes or so. Drain out most of the marinade but leave a little. Add seasoned flour directly to the bag and shake it up until all pieces are covered. Fry at 325F for 3-5 minutes until internal temp is 180F and they are perfectly golden brown. Double fry at 350F for 30 more seconds if you’re a real one.  #karaage #animefood #campfirecooking #friedchickenrecipe #fyp

d: Hands down the best Creamy Pesto Chicken pasta!!!  Serves: 2-4 Ingredients Chicken 2 chicken breasts 1 tbsp olive oil 1 tbsp butter 2 tbsp chicken bouillon 1 tsp chili flakes Juice of 1 lime 1 tsp Italian seasoning 2 tsp black pepper 1 tbsp smoked paprika 5 cloves garlic, minced 1 onion, chopped Pasta & Sauce 255 g gluten-free tagliatelle or pasta of choice 3 cups heavy cream 4 tbsp pesto 1/2 cup mozzarella cheese Optional Garnish Parmesan cheese Fresh basil Extra chili flakes Instructions Season the chicken In a bowl, coat the chicken breasts with olive oil, butter, chicken bouillon, garlic, smoked paprika, black pepper, Italian seasoning, chili flakes, and lime juice. Let sit for 10–30 minutes if possible. Cook the chicken Heat a large pan over medium heat. Add a little olive oil and butter if needed. Cook chicken breasts for 3–4 minutes per side until golden brown and fully cooked. Remove and let rest. Cook the aromatics In the same pan, add chopped onion and sauté for 2–3 minutes until softened. Add minced garlic and cook another 30 seconds. Make the sauce  Add smoked paprika and remaining spices if desired. Pour in heavy cream and simmer gently for a few minutes. Add pesto & cheese Stir in pesto and mozzarella cheese until melted and creamy. Cook the pasta Boil gluten-free tagliatelle according to package instructions. Reserve a little pasta water if needed. Combine Add cooked pasta to the sauce and toss well until coated. Simmer 2–3 minutes until thick and creamy. Finish Slice the rested chicken and place over the pasta. Garnish with parmesan, basil, or extra chili flakes. #chicken #pasta #dinner #familydinner #easyrecipe

d: cheesy potatoes, bacon and eggs breakfast skillet 4 medium potatoes (i’m using yukon gold) 1 bell pepper, diced finely 1/4 cup onion, diced finely  paprika garlic onion seasoning salt 6-8 strips bacon, cooked fully and chopped 4 large eggs  in a bowl, cover potatoes with water until just covered. microwave 1 minute to release starches, drain and set aside  cook bacon fully and set aside, drain fat except for 1-2 tablespoons add potatoes to bacon fat and fry for 5-7 minutes or until potatoes are golden brown add in bell pepper and onion and saute another 2-3 mins make 4 wells and drop 1 egg into each top with cheese, bacon and green onion (i didnt have any)  cover for 5 minutes on low heat to allow cheese to melt and eggs to cook #breakfastideas #brunch #easyrecipe #easybreakfast #recipes

d: Crispy tortilla cones filled with juicy spiced beef and topped with melted mozzarella 🧀🔥 The perfect crunchy snack or quick dinner that everyone will love. One bite and you’re hooked 🤤 Crispy Beef Cones (12 cones) Ingredients For the cones:  • 6 tortillas (25–30 cm / 10–12 inches)  • Toothpicks For the topping:  • Mozzarella cheese, 100 g  • Chopped parsley, 1 tsp For the beef mixture:  • Ground beef, 400 g(0.8lb)   • 1 yellow onion, finely chopped  • Garlic, 4 cloves, minced  • Red bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Green bell pepper, diced (about 1 small)  • Tomato paste, 1 big tbsp   • Soy milk, 100 ml (~ ½ cup) Seasoning:  • Paprika, 1 tbsp  • Chili powder, 1 tsp  • Turmeric, 1 tsp  • Garlic powder, 1 tsp  • Black pepper, 1 tsp  • Garam masala, 1 tsp  • Salt, ½ tsp Instructions 1.⁠ ⁠Prepare the beef mixture:  • Heat a little oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté until soft.  • Add the minced garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.  • Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it apart as it cooks.  • Stir in tomato paste, soy milk, diced bell peppers, and all seasonings. Cook until slightly thickened. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 2.⁠ ⁠Prepare the cones:  • Cut tortillas in half. Roll each half into a cone shape and secure the edge with a toothpick. Baking Method:  1. Preheat oven to 190°C (375°F).  2. Place cones on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Lightly spray with cooking spray.  3. Bake for 10–12 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Return to oven for 5 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. Air Fryer Method:   1. Preheat air fryer to 180°C (356°F).  2. Lightly spray cones with cooking spray and place them in the air fryer basket. Make sure they don’t touch each other.  3. Air fry for 6–8 minutes until crispy and golden.  4. Carefully fill each cone with the beef mixture and top with mozzarella cheese.  5. Air fry again for 3–4 minutes until cheese melts.  6. Garnish with parsley and serve warm. #crispybeef #quickrecipes #easyrecipes #lazydinner #beefcones

d: Cowboy butter steak sliders ✨🍔 Ingredients  Steak - 2 pounds ribeye or sirloin steak, sliced into strips - 2 tsp Worcestershire sauce  - 2 tsp garlic powder  - 1 tsp soy sauce  - Salt and pepper to taste (generous amount) - Smoked provolone cheese - Avocado oil for searing - Brioche buns “Caramelized” onions  - 2-3 medium yellow onion, sliced - 1 tsp granulated sugar  - Heaping pinch of salt Cowboy butter - 8 tbsp unsalted butter - 5 garlic cloves, minced  - 1 shallot, minced  - 1/2 lemon, freshly squeezed - 1 tbsp Dijon mustard  - 1 heaping tbsp parsley, chopped - 1 heaping tbsp chives, chopped - 1 tsp thyme - 1 tsp cayenne powder (adjust to heat preference  - 1/2 tsp red chili flakes - 1/2 tsp smoked paprika  - Salt to taste  Garlic butter - 1/4 cup unsalted butter, melted - 2 tbsp parsley, freshly chopped  - 1 heaping tsp garlic powder  - Salt to taste Instructions  - Toss sliced  steak with soy sauce, Worcestershire, garlic powder, and a generous amount of salt & pepper. Set aside. - Heat a skillet over medium heat with a little oil or butter. - Add onions, sugar, and salt. Cook 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until soft, golden, and jammy. Remove from pan and set aside. - Crank heat to medium-high/high. Add steak in a single layer (work in batches if needed). - Sear 2–3 minutes per side until deeply browned. Remove and set aside. Lower heat to medium. - Add butter to the same pan. Once melted, add garlic and shallot — cook ~30 seconds until fragrant. - Stir in lemon juice, Dijon, parsley, chives, thyme, cayenne, chili flakes, smoked paprika, and salt. - Add steak back to the pan. - Toss to coat in the butter sauce for 1–2 minutes. - Preheat your oven to 375°F. - In an oven-safe baking dish, layer the bottom halves of your sliced brioche buns with smoked provolone cheese. - Add a generous layer of caramelized onions, followed by your cooked steak, then top with more cheese. - Place the top halves of the brioche buns on top. - Cover with foil and bake for 15–20 minutes, or until the cheese is fully melted. - Remove the foil, brush with garlic butter, and bake uncovered for an additional 4–5 minutes until the buns are golden and crisp. - Take out of the oven, brush with more garlic butter, and serve warm. • • • #recipes #dinnerideas #sliders #steakrecipe #foodideas

Buffalo chicken cheesy garlic bread ✨🥖 Ingredients Chicken - 1.5 lb boneless chicken breast, diced - 2 tsp Fire & Smoke Society Chicka Licka Bam Bam seasoning  - 2 tsp garlic powder  - 2 tsp onion powder - 1 tsp paprika  - Salt and black pepper to taste - Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish) - 1/4 cup buffalo sauce  -  3 tbsp Mexican crema or sour cream  - 1 cup mozzarella cheese, shredded  Garlic ranch butter - 1 stick unsalted butter, softened  - 2 tbsp parsley, chopped - 2 tbsp Parmesan cheese  - 2 tsp garlic paste - 1 1/2 tsp ranch seasoning  - 1 tsp garlic powder - Salt and pepper to taste  Bread - 1 large loaf French bread or Italian bread, halved Instructions - Preheat oven to 400°F - In a large bowl, add diced chicken drizzle olive oil and add Chicka Licka Bam Bam seasoning, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt and pepper to taste.  - Cover and marinate for 30 minutes. - Heat a skillet with a little oil over medium-high - Add chicken in a single layer. Let it sear for 4-5 minutes before stirring. - Cook until fully done and slightly golden - Lower heat and mix in buffalo sauce  and crema - Stir until creamy and fully coated - Cover and let it simmer for 10 minutes. - Mix butter ingredients  - Slice the loaf in half lengthwise, spread on bread, add cheese, diced chicken, and a drizzle of sauce from the chicken. - Add to the oven for 15-20 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly. - Garnish with parsley and extra buffalo sauce - Slice and serve warm. • • • #recipe #dinnerideas #garlicbread #recipeideas #chickenrecipes

d: Cheesy Beef Crunch Pockets. Recipe ↓ ■ INGREDIENTS: • tortillas - 3 sheets • ground beef - 9 oz (250 g) • butter - 1 tsp • onion - 1 medium, finely chopped • green bell pepper - 1, finely chopped • red bell pepper - 1, finely chopped • corn (canned or frozen, thawed) - ½ cup (80 g) • shredded mozzarella - 7 oz (200 g) • salt - to taste • black pepper - ½ tsp • paprika or chili flakes - ½ tsp • fresh parsley - a small handful, chopped (optional) ■ HOW TO COOK: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. Add butter and ground beef, cook until browned. Add onion (squeeze excess juice out if very juicy) and sauté 2-3 min. Add bell peppers, corn, salt, pepper, paprika. Cook until soft and fragrant. Stir in parsley if using. Let the filling cool slightly. 2. Lightly sprinkle wrap with water so it becomes flexible. Cut each sheet in half. 3. Place meat filling on one side, add shredded cheese on top. Fold into triangles. 4. Arrange triangles on a lined baking tray. Sprinkle a little extra cheese on top. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 20-25 minutes, until deeply golden and crispy. 5. Let rest 5 minutes - then enjoy that crunch. ■ INFO (approx.): Prep: 15 min  Cook: 30 min Serves: 4 ~480 kcal | 28 g protein | 26 g fat | 35 g carbs (per serving) #dinnerideas #dinner #recipe #easyrecipes #easyrecipes

d: Hassle back potatoes with creamy Cajun chicken and airfried brocollini . Easy, healthy comfort meal  Potato recipe 6 medium potatoes 3 tbsp butter (melted) 2 tbsp olive oil 4–5 cloves garlic (minced) 1½ tsp paprika 1½ tsp onion granules 1½ tsp garlic granules 1 tsp dried parsley Salt & pepper 1–2 tsp all-purpose seasoning Method: Slice each potato thinly (don’t cut all the way through). Mix melted butter, olive oil, garlic, and all seasonings. Brush generously over all 6 potatoes, getting into the layers. Air fry at 180°C for 35–45 mins (depending on size). Brush with extra butter halfway through for that crispy finish. Chicken recipe  Ingredients: 1 tbsp olive oil 1½ tsp Cajun seasoning ½ tsp salt ½ tsp black pepper 1 tsp paprika 1 tsp onion powder Method: Add the sliced chicken to a bowl. Drizzle over the olive oil. Sprinkle all the seasonings evenly. Mix well until every piece is fully coated. Let it sit for 10–15 minutes (optional, but boosts flavor). Pan-fry on medium-high heat until golden and cooked through. Cajun Sauce: 1 tbsp butter ½ onion (diced) 150–200ml heavy cream Same seasonings as chicken Instructions  In the same pan, melt butter and cook onions until soft. Add cream + seasoning, simmer until thickened. Add chicken back in and coat in sauce. #dinnerideas #recipe #easyrecipes #cooking #airfryerrecipe

d: Viral Pepperoni Pizza Caesar Wrap Recipe 🍕 made this wrap for dinner and my family enjoy it! It’s like having a pizza and a Caesar salad together but without the carbs☺️ Makes 2 wraps Ingredients For the Cheese Wraps * 1½ cups freshly grated part-skim low-moisture mozzarella cheese * 14–16 pepperoni slices * sprinkle with oregano and red pepper flakes For the Caesar Salad * 1 head romaine lettuce * ¼ cup crushed croutons * Extra parmesan cheese, for topping For the Caesar Dressing * ¼ cup Best Foods mayonnaise * ¼ cup 0% Greek yogurt * Juice from ½ lemon * 2 tsp Worcestershire sauce * 1½ tsp Dijon mustard * 1 large garlic clove, grated * ¼ cup grated parmesan cheese * ¼–½ tsp black pepper Directions 1. Preheat oven to 375°F. 2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Spread ¾ cup freshly grated part-skim low-moisture mozzarella into a thin tortilla-sized circle. Top each with 7–8 pepperoni slices and sprinkle with the oregano and red pepper flakes. 3. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy around the edges and golden brown. 4. Slice the romaine lettuce lengthwise, chop into thin strips, rinse under cold water, and dry very well using a salad spinner. 5. In a bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, Greek yogurt, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, Dijon mustard, garlic, parmesan, and black pepper. 6. Toss the romaine with most of the dressing, crushed croutons, and parmesan cheese. 7. Let the wraps cool slightly, then fill with the Caesar salad. Top with extra parmesan, croutons, and dressing if desired. #dinnerideas #easydinners #caesarsalad #pizza #wrap

d: Recipe⤵️ Would you eat this? Spicy Gochujang Potato Noodles Ingredients: For the Noodles: 2 small/ medium potatoes, around 275 grams ½ cup tapioca starch ½ cup cornstarch ¼ cup warm water ½ tsp salt For the Sauce: 2 tbsp gochujang (I used gluten-free) 1 tbsp gochugaru 2 tbsp soy sauce (I used gluten-free) 1 tbsp granulated sugar 1 tsp garlic powder 1-2 tsp sesame seeds ¼ cup water Directions: For the Noodles: Peel and cube the potatoes; cook in boiling water until soft, then drain Mash the potatoes in a bowl, then add in the tapioca starch, cornstarch, water, and salt Mix to form a dough, then divide into 6-8 equal pieces Roll each dough piece into a ball, then into a long rod to make thick noodles Bring a pot of water to a boil, then cook the noodles for 10 to 15 minutes, until very soft Remove the noodles from the water and place in an ice bath until the sauce is ready For the Sauce: In a bowl, combine the gochujang, gochugaru, soy sauce, sugar, garlic powder, sesame seeds, and water Drain the noodles, then add them to a sauce pan along with the sauce, and cook on medium heat until the sauce starts to simmer and thickens to your liking Remove from the heat and serve with more sesame seeds on top Enjoy!! #potatonoodles #spicynoodlerecipes #trendingfoods #viralrecipes

These are our viral kebabs skewers!  They are so fast to make and they cook in a cast-iron skillet very fast you’ll be shocked! You cut them in 1 inch columns and you can use wooden or metal skewers. One of our kids,  favorite! Tortilla Kebab Skewers  Mix: 3 lbs ground beef, 2 minced onions, 1 minced red bell pepper, 6 garlic cloves, 1/4 c parsley, 1 tbsp cumin, 2 tbsp paprika, 2 tbsp coriander, 1 tbsp garlic powder, 2 tsp black pepper, 1–1.5 tbsp kosher salt. Spread mix on 10 square-cut x-large tortillas. Stack 5 at a time with a tortilla on top + bottom (2 stacks). Cut 1” wide strips, turn on side, press onto skewers. Cut between skewers. Grill in oiled cast iron, a few mins per side (4 turns). Sauce: Simmer 8 oz butter & 1/4 cup olive oil together for a minute or two then add, 1/2 minced onion, 1/4 c parsley, 4 minced garlic cloves, salt, pepper, and chili flakes to test. Cocktail onions are softened and starting to go. Dip or drizzle—done! ##kebab##easydinner##quickrecipes##dinnerideas##easymeal

This Street Food Is Going VIRAL!
#indianfood #streetfood #tiktokviral #trendingvideos #fyp

After years of living in China, I’ve honestly come to see street food as better than restaurant food most of the time. Of course there are exceptions, but the best street vendors usually have a personal stake in every dish they serve. They’re cooking the same handful of specialties day after day, refining them over years, sometimes decades. There’s a sense of pride and care that’s hard to replicate in a larger restaurant. And beyond the food itself, there’s something deeply satisfying about eating on the street. No fancy décor, no presentation tricks—just great food, fresh air, and everyday life happening around you. It feels more honest, more connected to the place and the people who live there. Restaurants can offer comfort and occasion, but street food often offers something rarer: authenticity. #china #chinesefood #streetfood #familytime #chinalife

d: 英雄联盟手游，现在已经彻底被光子运营凉了，恶心的匹配机制不说，现在竟然引入大量人机，当一款游戏的环境出现谩骂飞天，玩家动不动就摆烂的现状的时候，那就是说明你该黄的时候了。然后官方呢？对此毫不理睬，依旧研究着怎么样去出新皮肤，怎么样把皮肤换个颜色卖钱，玩都没法玩，天天经历赢一输三，赢二输六的匹配机制，还去买你皮肤？压箱底啊？我也是一个经历不删档测试走到现在的老玩家了，对于这款游戏有的除了心寒就是心寒。因为一路走来看到的都是官方犹如跳梁小丑般的拙劣演出，水晶大转盘让喷的狗血淋头，之后又请代言人，劝退了一波玩家，让一个仅仅公测数月的手游竟然开启老友召回模式，还有现在的让人无语机制。其实说白了你们根本没拿玩家当人，看清了你的丑恶嘴脸，也让我发现所谓的情怀，在你们眼里只是一个氪金割韭菜的借口罢了。退了，就像当初玩全民超神时，@英雄联盟手游 #英雄联盟手游 #lolm
zh: 英雄联盟手游已被光子运营彻底毁掉——恶心的匹配机制不说，还引入大量人机；游戏环境充斥谩骂与摆烂，官方却只顾出新皮肤捞钱；赢一输三、赢二输六的循环让人心寒，从不删档测试走到现在，看到的只有官方的拙劣表演。情怀在他们眼里不过是割韭菜的借口，退游

d: 周润发71岁生日简简单单家中欢度 5月18日，周润发迎来了自己的71岁生日。没有举办奢华宴会，也没有邀请众多明星捧场，而是选择在家中低调度过，与家人和挚友温馨相聚。周润发身穿橙色休闲卫衣，佩戴黑框眼镜，一头银灰短发梳理得干净利落。桌上摆放着传统的寿桃礼盒和寿桃蛋糕。妻子陈荟莲抱爱犬依偎在身旁，两人笑容自然舒展。他站在寿桃蛋糕前笑容满面地许下生日愿望：“祝大家身体健康。”许愿后，周润发没有像常人那样用嘴吹灭蜡烛，而是直接抬手一掌拍灭。这一随性、干脆的动作被网友热议，称赞其“老顽童”本色，网友：“法拉利老了还是法拉利。”寿桃蛋糕上写着：“唱好狮子山，跑匀维港湾。祝发哥好气好力，身体健康。”最近几年周润发热爱跑步，并参加多次马拉松赛事。2025年2月，年近70岁的周润发以2小时24分33秒的成绩跑完了半程马拉松，生命在于运动！#明星 #娱乐 #周润发 #周润发71岁生日 #祝男神生日快乐
zh: 周润发71岁生日低调在家欢度，用手拍灭蜡烛成网络热议

1️⃣准备动作：先挺胸抬头，把身体站直，像根小树苗一样挺拔，为后续动作打好基础～
2️⃣点手胯部配合：左手先点一下，同时胯往左边顶；右手再点一下，胯跟着往右边顶，左右交替，注意动作要连贯自然～
3️⃣压手摆胯：双手轻轻下压，同时胯开始大幅度摆动，想象自己在画一个大大的圆圈，动作要流畅～
4️⃣胸胯配合：胸口和胯部同步，往上顶的时候带点“摸”的动作，让身体更有波动感，这个动作最有节奏感～
5️⃣放胯收胯：左右各两下，先向右下方放髋，再向左下方放髋，然后连续做两次，动作要干脆利落～

刚开始可能会有点僵硬，多练几次就能和音乐完美融合啦～不管是跳给朋友看，还是自己放松，都超合适～

#舞蹈#休闲舞蹈#网红舞
zh: 零基础怎么跳网红舞？5步轻松入门：准备动作、点手胯部配合、压手摆胯、胸胯配合、放胯收胯，跟着练就能上手

原创扇子舞《又唱浏阳河》原速版。💃原创扇子舞《又唱浏阳河》终于出原速完整视频啦！编舞超有感觉，手里的扇子随着旋律开合，每一个动作都透着灵动。

歌词里唱着"家乡有支歌，啊一支难忘的歌"，跳这支舞时仿佛真的回到了那个有浏阳河的地方。湘江水的绿、洞庭波的红，都在扇子的摇摆中慢慢浮现。

"你是一支永恒的歌，永远温暖我心窝"，音乐响起时整个人都跟着放松下来，跟着节奏摇摆，感觉所有的烦恼都被这歌声和舞姿带走了。

#舞蹈#古典舞#非遗舞

预算不够别乱花钱！这几种小吃低成本就能学。预算不够别乱花钱！这几种小吃低成本就能学
没本钱想摆摊、想副业创业的宝子看过来
不用大几千学费，几百块就能学会的小众小吃，新手零压力起步！
不用租门面、不用复杂设备、食材随处都能买
0 基础也能快速上手，在家练几天就能出摊

1 秘制卤味
食材成本超低，配方简单好复刻
卤鸡爪、卤素菜、卤豆干，受众广男女老少都爱吃
出摊快、打包方便，利润还超高

2 特色烤肠 + 淀粉肠
设备便宜，操作毫无难度
不用早起熬夜，放学下班摆摊都能卖
回本特别快，新手首选小白项目

3 网红冒烟水果杯
颜值超高自带流量，不用复杂手艺
水果 + 配料简单搭配，夏天旺季爆卖
投入少、颜值高，特别适合女生做

4 罐罐米线
一个小罐就能摆摊，口味可调麻辣鲜香
做法流程标准化，好学好复制
街边、夜市、小区门口都好卖

5 手工包子馒头
老少皆宜刚需小吃，永远不愁没生意
发面配方一学就会，早上摆摊就能赚零花钱
想低成本创业、不想被割韭菜的

别再盲目报高价培训班啦
这些小吃投入低、上手快、风险小
普通人也能靠摆摊踏实挣钱
